9/21/21, 6:32 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
September 21st, 2021.

*UPHOLDING KINGDOM VALUES* Pt.9

Hebrews 11:1 Faith shows the reality of what we hope for; it is the evidence of things we cannot see. NLT

*VALUE OF FAITH*

If the richest man in the world gives you a cheque of $1 million dollars on a weekend when banks are closed with the hope that on one of the working days, you will take it to the bank to get your money,  will you doubt the authenticity of that cheque? I'm sure you will not because you know the person who gave you the cheque is worth more than what he gave and is capable of giving more. Also, his signature on the cheque is authentic. Even though you haven't gotten the cash physically in your hands or transferred the money to your bank account, in your mind, you believe without doubt that you are $1 million dollar richer. In fact, you may start planning what to do with the money as though you have it. What I just describe to us is faith.


*When you strongly believe what you have not seen because someone superior with a proven track record of integrity promised certain things to you, that is simply faith.* God's word is the promissory note that forms the basis of our believing even when we haven't seen what is promised.  Here, faith in God's word is of great value  to God. He is honoured when we trust Him and take Him at His word. One line in our hymn says, "Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus, just to take Him at His word". Faith is taking God at His word saying "according to your word I believe". The integrity of God is tied to His word. God doesn't deny His word. At every point in our lives, God want us to take Him at His word in prayer.

*It should be noted that you don't need to see what is promised before believing, rather you believe before seeing what is promised*. You act and talk as though you have it already even when your physical eyes haven't seen it. That's faith. *Faith is believing God's word, talking God's word and acting on God's word.* Start believing God's word. God places value on a life of faith. It takes faith to obey God. For example, God may be calling you to do great things for Him in the kingdom yet you may not have resources. Faith will launch out trusting God to bring needed resources for the task. It is God's desire that faith becomes our lifestyle and not just a tool of solving problems when they arise. .

CONFESSION: My faith is activated by the Word, I live in the realm of possibilities. All things are working for me by Faith, I believe I have my anwers already in the name of Jesus.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.1

1Thess4:3 For this is the will of God, even your sanctification, that ye should abstain from fornication: KJV

*UNDERSTANDING 'PORNEIA'*


I was introduced to sexual immorality as a teenager while in secondary school. It was our way of catching fun, like a sport among the boys. We patronized prostitutes and whenever we return to school the next day, we discussed how the whole event went. Girls of our age were deemed small because we were engaging the "big girls". Our sexual appetites were drawn towards matured ladies. Pornography fueled this partly. One of my colleagues in class would always see me off to the brothel at night, he normally stay outside but he never entered. Funnily, he was a Muslim seeing off a pastor's son to the house of prostitutes, glory slayers. Whenever I look back at those awful days of my life, I feel pained that I ever did such evil. Sometimes, i feel i lost something on the bed of immorality that i should recover. I thank God for His deliverance and salvation. All around the world, sexual immorality has become the norm even among clergies. The vow of celibacy among priests has been broken by some because a vow cannot stop the excesses of a polluted mind that is not transformed. The sex drive of some persons can drive a truck, they are burning under almost always.



God is calling everyone of us into sexual purity in this sex crazy world where seduction and sex appeal is used to advertise good&services. Rev Olusola Areogun said, *"You are not pure until you are sexually pure*". I cannot agree less. What is "porneia"? In the opening text, the Greek "Porneia" is the word rendered as "fornication". It should be rendered as "sexual immorality" instead of fornication because in English language, fornication refers to sexual intercourse between unmarried people. Apostle Paul didn't limit sexual sin to the unmarried. He was warning against all forms of sexual immorality either between same sex, singles or married, incest,list, prostitution, bestiality and other forms of bizarre sexual practices. The revered apostle was telling his readers that the will of God for them is to be sanctified and that sanctification is to be expressed through abstinence from "porneia"- all forms of sexual immorality.

To those trapped in the cocoon of sexual immorality, it always appear as if it is impossible to break free. It seems as if the power of emotions is stronger than the power of the will to say no. As a matter of fact, some may be hearing ten messages on holiness and still be having sex right there either in their minds or physically because of their crazy drive that has spiraled out of control. I am here to tell you that no matter how bad your case may be, God will deliver you. The very first thing I want you to settle on your heart is this: "It is God's will for me to abstain from sexual immorality and to live pure in a sex crazy world". It is very possible.


*PRAYER*: Father I thank you for your word. I believe your word and I take sides with your verdict that sexual purity is possible in this sex crazy world. Lord, I choose to live a sexually pure life, help my resolve in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.2

1Thess4:3 For this is the will of God, even your sanctification, that ye should abstain from fornication: KJV

*WHY THE EMPHASIS ON SEXUAL IMMORALITY*?


I am a living witness of the havoc sexual immorality can wreck in the life of people especially those that carry a glorious destiny. I gave my life to Christ as a junior secondary school student. Immediately after salvation, I started preaching in the school with a colleague. Those days, Christian fellowship was outlawed in my school but we went ahead preaching from class to class, gathering students for the word and prayer unofficially. At the end of every examination while waiting for result, we organized conference meetings within the school. Some of our teachers and seniors attended because what we were doing was impactful with great testimonies of salvation, healing and miracles but there was no one to disciple us and teach us how to walk with God without falling. The devil saw this gap in our walk with the Lord and set a dirty trap of immorality for us. By the time we got to SSS1, we had become cold and dull spiritually. We began to do girls and graduated to prostitutes and alcohol.  On one occasion, I became drunk in the school but my colleagues covered me, the sick bay became my refuge place for hiding.



I thank God for restoration at the age of 17. My encounter with the Lord in my pre admission years on OAU campus before I left for the University set me on course for destiny. Hallelujah!!! God is in the business of restoration. Though God forgave me but I knew I lost something vital on the bed of immorality. That was the beginning of other troubles in my life that led me to into spiritual warfare. I have heard some ask, "is sexual sin the only sin?" They ask this question to downplay the emphasis on sexual immorality. Of course, I agree that sexual sin is not the only sin and all sins can take people to hell, there's no doubt about that. *However, the only sin known to empty men or women of virtues and glory quickly is sexual immorality.* That's why it is a very dangerous sin. God will forgive every act of sexual immorality like He will telling a lie if those involve ask for forgiveness and truly repent. The blood of Jesus is still potent but what is lost on the altar of immorality may take years to recover. My mentor once said that recovery from sexual immorality may take 20 years.


*The devil uses the bait of sexual immorality to empty men and women on great kingdom assignments*. Samson was anointed for a "dangerous" purpose likewise Joseph. Both of them had destinies that will affect a nation positively. The devil knew there was something great about these men so he set them up for a fall, one fell while the other succeeded. The moment you set out to do great things for the kingdom, just know that your major temptation and battle with the flesh may come along the line of sexual immorality. *No sin empties a man quickly as sexual immorality does.* That's why we have to be on guard always as the world has become sex crazy and our arch enemy is planning to spare no one from being a victim. Don't forget the quote of Rev Areogun, *"You are not pure until you are sexually pure*".



*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to stand and to be sexually pure in the name of Jesus Christ.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.3

1 For 6:16 Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, “The two will become one flesh.” ESV


*EFFECTS- SOUL-TIE*

I heard the story of a lady whose boyfriend attempted to remove her eyes during a scuffle. Somehow, she managed to escape and everyone around her concluded the relationship was over. Not long after, they came together. That surprised everyone. Another story I can never forget is that of a lady who told me her boyfriend always batter her physically. I told her to quit the relationship immediately but she said, "I think he beats me because he loves me". I was dumbfounded immediately she said that. Now, what played out in the two stories is the power of soul tie. When two people are joined together through sex, a soul tie is formed.


What is a soul tie? *A soul tie is the spiritual connection binding two or more people together. Often, this is formed through sex*. In the Bible, it doesn’t use the word soul tie, but it speaks of  souls being knit together, becoming one flesh, etc. Soul ties are not necessarily bad.  Soul ties between married couples draw them together like magnets, while soul ties between adulterers&fornicators can draw a beaten and abused woman to the man which in the natural realm she would hate and run from, but instead she runs to him even though he doesn’t love her, and treats her like dirt. I know you might have seen something like this but do not understand. This is where the danger of sexual immorality lies. *When soul tie is formed on the altar of sexual immorality, a single lady or brother will become blind to the killer flaws of his/ her partner only to realize how dangerous those flaws are in marriage." That's why we preach against sex before marriage. If soul tie is not broken between erstwhile lovers who are married to separate spouses, they can have extra marital affair with each other in marriage if the opportunity is there. That's what some commonly call "sparking Old flames". Hardly do ladies break free in their heart from their first boy friend especially the man that deflowered them. That's why we teach that there must be total separation between people who were once sexually active.


*In the demonic world, unholy soul ties can serve as bridges between two people to pass demonic garbage( curses, retrogression, sickness,etc) through. It is the means of demonic spirit transfer.* Many people have become demonized unknowingly through sex. They fight spiritual battles they inherited through sex. As a minister of few years, I've seen this even between legally married couples. This is a deep spiritual truth many refuse to accept. Other soul ties can do things such as allow one person to manipulate and control another person, and the other person is unaware to what is going on or knows what is going on, but for no real reason, allows it to continue. This is witchcraft. That's why sex is a tool of witches to manipulate people. Some men are under heavy manipulation from ladies they've slept with and their wives would be wondering what is wrong with their loving husbands. Today, I am glad to let you know that no matter how far the enemy has dealt with you through soul ties, Jesus can set you free: *"Shall the prey be taken from the mighty, or the lawful captive delivered? But thus saith the Lord, Even the captives of the mighty shall be taken away, and the prey of the terrible shall be delivered: for I will contend with him that contendeth with thee, and I will save thy children.*"( Isaiah 49:24-25).

*PRAYER*: Father, I break every soul tie formed on the altar of sexual immorality in Jesus name. I receive total deliverance from the garbage brought into my life through soul ties.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.4

1 Cor 6:16 Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, “The two will become one flesh.” ESV


*BREAKING SOUL TIES*(A)


In the spirit realm, a soul tie creates one of the strongest spiritual centripetal forces that connects and brings two or more persons together. Just as it was said previously,  a soul tie is the reason why some married women will secretly engage in extra marital affair with their ex boyfriend.  Same applies to some men. Unbroken soul tie has broken marriages and rendered lives useless. *To break unholy soul ties, repentance is the starting point. True repentance is not just a feeling of remorse for sinning but a total change of mind about sin*. You can't say you have repented if you still have plans to engage in sexual immorality even if it is with one partner. The idea of repentance some have is that they will disengage their numerous sex partners and stick to one. That's not true repentance. As long as your engagement with the opposite sex is unholy(even if it is with one person at a time), you have not repented.


*"What shall we say then? Shall we continue in sin, that grace may abound? God forbid. How shall we, that are dead to sin, live any longer therein?*"(Romans 6:1-2 KJV). True repentance will break the backbone of unholy soul ties. *Repentance is man's responsibility but forgiveness is God's responsibility*. In our walk with God, there's a manward side and a Godward side. The immortal God has no business repenting because He is 100% holy but mortal man needs repentance to be put things right with God. God's duty is  to forgive and give grace. *Forgiveness is God's merciful response to repentance*.


When teaching about repentance, I love to use the story of the prodigal son. Scripture says, *"When he finally came to his senses, he said to himself, ‘At home even the hired servants have food enough to spare, and here I am dying of hunger!*"(Luke15:17). The opening statement of that text "when he finally came to his senses" is the beginning of true repentance. True repentance is only possible when you truly come back to your senses and that's the only time repentance will make sense to God not just when you engage in mere lip confession.  You need to realize the damage sexual sin has done in your life and decide never to return. The message of repentance is not old-fashion as some are trying to portray. In several portions of the New testament canon, the theme of repentance runs through. Even to that backslidden church, Jesus said, *"Consider how far you have fallen! REPENT and do the things you did at first. If you do not repent, I will come to you and remove your lampstand from its place.*" (Rev2:15). You must hate sexual sin passionately and make a decision never to return. Grace is available to help your resolve, ask for it.


*PRAYER*: Father, I come before your throne of grace,I need mercy. Lord I receive the grace to turn a new leaf and to go and sin no more in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.5

1 Cor 6:16 Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, “The two will become one flesh.” ESV

*BREAKING SOUL TIES*(B)


There are certain things that hold a soul tie in place. If we must break soul ties completely, we need to take radical steps for a lasting and enduring result. Soul ties are strong, when they are not broken, the forces behind it doesn't respect whether you are saved, a preacher or a church founder. A preacher once confirmed this by saying that if he meets his old girl friend, the tendency of committing immorality is high. He knows what he was saying. This is one of the mystery of sexual immorality that many believers do not understand. *You are no longer who you are after a round of sex, so many transactions( giving, receiving & bonding) has taken place and you will need a complete divine overhaul to be whole again because after sexual intercourse, a part of you is deposited with each other*.



*After repentance, you can break soul ties by  breaking vows made through endearing words and doing away with gifts received during the sinful relationship*. The latter may be hard for so many folks to do but it works. Words & gifts perpetuate soul ties. I have seen some folks playing with fire. They still collect gifts from their ex boyfriends/ girlfriends whom they were sexually active with  and still use endearing words when communicating with them. Doing this, they are strengthening the ties that binds. Though there's no commitment between them any longer but their bodies are prepared to give expression to the ties that binds their soul. *Words are powerful, they covenant people together*. The careless use of words like "My dear, my Darling, My babe, Honey, mine forever, etc" can strengthen soul ties. Words can lead a woman on to think she still has a place in your life after you've moved on when she doesn't. Gifts cement the covenants and perpetuate it. Don't be a fool, you must deliberately discontinue collecting gifts from someone who once had sex with you or has sexual intentions for you. Sometimes, you may not have had sex with the person but the mood and nuances of the person shows that if there's an opportunity for such, it may happen. From such people, don't collect gifts. I've spoken to people who had sex with a person they didn't have commitment with and i asked, "How did it happen"? Often, the response is always, "I don't know how it happened" but this teaching is the explanation on how it happened- words, gifts& unusual closeness. Often, ladies( even married women) can perceive from afar men with unholy interests but quite a number of them ignore this red flag thinking they can handle it but they forget that words & gifts has created a soul tie already. This doesn't exempt married folks. If you are married, don't be careless in collecting gifts from the opposite sex especially your ex or those showing unholy interest in you. You will press a self destruct button for your marriage soon.  Even some bitter divorcee still have sex secretly yet there's no longer commitment to live together. Dearest, soul tie is powerful.


The bible told us to flee all appearances of evil(1Thess5:22). *If you have truly repented and have decided never to return to your vomit, do away with gifts gotten from that sinful relationship and break the vows/ covenants cut through endearing words.* Where possible, return what you can return. You can't be driving the car of your former sex partner and think he doesn't have in-road into your heart any longer, that's a foolish joke. Return the car and trust God for yours. The fight against sin could be tough but it is worth it as nothing is too much to do for eternity sake.  *The power of life and death is in the tongue. You can give life to the soul tie that binds you through your words and you can put soul tie to death permanently through your words*. Never think those words were spoken into thin air and are gone. There are spirits that pick words to ensure they are fulfilled. Now that you are blood washed, you must not be ignorant of this at the detriment of your sexual purity. Break those vows using the name of Jesus Christ and return gifts collected during such unholy engagements where possible.


*PRAYER*: I break every vow made during unholy relationship(s) perpetuating unholy soul ties in my life. I renounce every endearing  word spoken to me and by me to a sex partner aside my spouse. I nullify their effect over me in Jesus name. Blood of Jesus, purify my heart and cleanse me totally. I receive the grace to do away with gifts  gotten through unholy relationship in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.6

1 Cor 6:16 Or do you not know that he who is joined to a prostitute becomes one body with her? For, as it is written, “The two will become one flesh.” ESV

*BREAKING SOUL TIES*(C)

There is no soul tie that cannot be broken no matter how strong it is. My Jesus is still in the business of restoring lives and destinies, beating broken lives back to shape and using them for God's glory. No matter how long the devil has dealt with you on the bed of immorality, God can cleanse you and make you whole. Reading this message or teaching, I don't want you to feel guilty at all. The bible says, *"let us go right into the presence of God with sincere hearts fully trusting him. For our guilty consciences have been sprinkled with Christ’s blood to make us clean, and our bodies have been washed with pure water*" (Heb10:22). The blood of Jesus Christ is still very potent to cleanse your sexual sins and God will never keep the  record: *"For I will forgive their wickedness and will remember their sins no more*"( Heb8:12).

More on breaking soul ties, you have to forgive yourself and those you've been sexually involved with. When you don't forgive yourself, it is a sin. You are belittling the blood of Jesus Christ and the forgiveness of God. You must believe that God has forgiven and forgotten all your dirty past. Most times, we fall prey of the enemy's tactics in this area and we become victims of what we're trying to overcome. There are people who are bound in unforgiveness either towards their ex or to themselves. They think that maintaining a steady bitter attitude towards their ex or themselves is what will make sexual sin repulsive to them but while in that condition, they find themselves back to their vomit. Haven't you seen people who regretted ever being in a relationship with a guy/ girl and beat themselves about it and later warm the bed of the person they hate? It happens. In fact, the frequency of sexual involvement may increase thereafter and they'll be wondering why it happened. That's unholy soul tie at work. Such persons are trying to break soul ties with will power and tool of the enemy ( bitterness, anger&hatred). It doesn't work that way. You cannot use the devil's tool against the devil.





When the situation is like this, simply forgive the person and yourself. Break ties with the person physically, emotionally and spiritually and move on. You have to consciously do this and continually renounce the soul ties. Unforgiveness in any form gives the enemy a foothold to deal with you. In Ephesians4:27, the bible says, *"and do not give the devil a foothold.*" You don't have to be a victim of your past in the present. If you are, you may hamper your glorious future. The path to freedom is not always easy because it comes with lots of sacrifices but it is rewarding if you can apply yourself to these counsel. I see God breaking you free from unholy soul ties in Jesus name.
*CONFESSION*: I walk in love towards anyone in my past. I forgive anyone who may have taken advantage of me in my past and those to whom I gave my body. I forgive myself because God has forgiven me ad His blood has atoned for me. I refuse to be held by my past and I choose to follow God. It is a new dawn for me and my story is changing for good in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.7

Proverbs 6:26 For by means of a whorish woman a man is brought to a piece of bread: and the adulteress will hunt for the precious life.


*LOSS OF VIRTUES AND GLORY*

I know a brother who in his prime was very promising. He was doing fine as a ministry person and all eyes were on him. This brother has depth in bible knowledge and he carried the power of the Spirit. I can attest to this because of the diverse manifestations that characterized his ministry. He need not lay hands on people before they are slain in the Spirit. The spiritual life of this brother degenerated to the point where he became an alcoholic, a cigarette smoker and street guy playing snooker around. This is someone who could have been a pioneer of kingdom revival movement. He was once a terror to the enemy but he lost it on the bed of immorality. The moment he dabbled into  sexual sin, he came down. The man who was once loved and admired by all became an object of scorn and derision. He lost the goodwill of the people.

*Aside the formation of soul ties, another dangerous effect of sexual immorality is its ability to make a man/woman lose virtues and glory*. Sexual immorality has a reducing effect; the opening text describes the effect it has as turning a man to a loaf of bread. The destructible nature of bread is known to all. With ease, anyone can tear bread into pieces. That's the perfect illustration of what the enemy will do to those involved in sexual immorality. In the  bible, Samson is an example of this point. After his encounter with Delilah, his hair ( the secret of his power) was shaved. When the Philistines came upon him to over power him, he wanted to rise in power as he used to but the bible said, *"And she said, The Philistines be upon thee, Samson. And he awoke out of his sleep, and said, I will go out as at other times before, and shake myself. And he wist not that the LORD was departed from him.*"( Judges16:20). Oh! That's a sorry state in the life of any man who once walked in the power of the Spirit.


There are many Samsons today. Some have met Delilah and are aground while others are on the way to her house or have invited her not knowing she's on a mission to destroy. Dearest, you carry an enviable glory and your destiny is a threat to the enemy. The devil knows the power you carry and the damage you can do to his kingdom. You are a kingdom time bomb going somewhere to explode. He knows. He will do everything possible to suck you dry and empty you of what you carry through sexual immorality. That's why the devil made the sin of sexual immorality popular and easy today. He's catching people young so that before they realize, their productive years would have been gone. He knows what he is doing. You can call the devil several names but don't call him a fool. He is strategic and calculated. Don't let the enemy have access to your hair( Symbolic of glory&power- 1Cor 11:15) like he did to Samson. Guard your life, your destiny and glory jealously.

*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 0284 | Source start line: 26694

9/29/21, 6:36 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.8

Hebrews 12:16 See that no one is sexually immoral, or is godless like Esau, who for a single meal sold his inheritance rights as the oldest son.

*LOSS OF INHERITANCE*

The jewish culture is patriarchal. The first son in a family is considered an important figure. Even if he is the last born, as long as he is the first son in the family, tradition owe him so much. The inheritance that accrues to him is more than that of any other person in the family. By virtue of his position, he is the family leader and upon his shoulder lies the government of his ancestry. It is a thing of honour to be the first son in a Jewish family though it comes with responsibilities. When the writer of Hebrews( our opening text) was warning against sexual immorality and godlessness, he brought in the story of Esau and he compared a sexually immoral or godless person with Esau who sold his inheritance just for a single meal.


*It is safe to say that anyone who engage in sexual immorality will trade his/her inheritance(spiritually) for a life of emptiness, shame and doom.* Every sexual encounter doesn't leave those involved the same way they were before the encounter. There are a number of persons who have emptied their inheritance on the bed of immorality and are moving around without knowing. The life of some may have been better than what it is today save for their involvement in sexual immorality. There are many believers going from mountain to mountain asking for restoration of what is lost in their lives but haven't closed the door against leakage in their lives. Some persons may think these things are unreal because of some "prosperous immoral" persons they know. The truth of the matter is that when somethings go wrong with some persons, they don't come out in the open to tell us. Also, they have a way of covering it up but behind all we see, there's a serious problem.


What is lost to sexual immorality is more than what is gained. I know a married man who was bubbling and God's blessings were evident in his life. He got involved in sexual immorality with a lady. His wife and some persons knew about this because their amorous affair was disgraceful. Gradually, his life spiralled downward but we didn't know what was wrong. Years later, the young lady whom he was involved with wanted to marry and she demanded a deliverance session. During the deliverance session, the spirit(of immorality) in her spoke about how they have ruined the man's life and that he may never recover in life. Truly, that man has not recovered. He's been struggling ever since. I know those involved in all aspect of this story firsthand. *If you value your destiny and the inheritance God has for you as a son, don't play with sexual immorality. It is no sport or fun outside marriage.*


*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.9


Genesis 38:18 And he said, What pledge shall I give thee? And she said, Thy signet, and thy bracelets, and thy staff that is in thine hand. And he gave it her, and came in unto her, and she conceived by him. KJV


*THE SIGNET, BRACELETS AND SCEPTRE*

There's a story of great importance in Genesis 38 that is highly relevant to our discuss. It is the story of Judah's sexual engagement with his daughter in-law. Without going into much details about processes and events, he had intercourse with his daughter-in-law who disguised like a prostitute. The lady asked for three items that were of great importance before she allowed Judah to sleep with her: Signet, bracelet and sceptre/ staff. These three items are symbolic and no one in his/ her right senses would give them out but Judah did because of sexual pleasure. What is the significance of a signet, bracelet& staff?



The ancients used signets to mark their possessions and to sign contracts. It is a person's signature. Ancient kings used signet rings to designate authority, honour, or ownership. A signet contained an emblem unique to the king. Official documents were sealed with a dollop of soft wax impressed with the king’s signet, usually kept on a ring on his finger. Such a seal certified the document as genuine, much like a notary public’s stamp today. A scepter is a ceremonial staff, often used by kings. With its jewels and ornamentation, a scepter is a symbol of power. The bracelet is an ornament of beauty. If we'll interpret and adapt these symbolic objects properly, we can say that Judah lost authority and honour(signet), beauty( bracelet) and power to rule( staff) all because of sexual pleasure.


*The bible didn't record that story without a didactic purpose. The purpose is to teach us what anyone stand to lose on the bed of sexual immorality: Authority and honour, beauty and power*. Samson lost all of these after engaging Delilah, Reuben lost thesame because he slept with his father's concubine, David lost these things temporarily because he coveted another man's wife. Satan knows these secrets and even more and that's why he strategically use the bait of immorality against anyone who is on the path to greatness in the kingdom. Among occult, sex is a tool of initiation, worship and capturing their prey. I once met two men who told me they lost their ministry and anointing to sexual immorality. They described how God worked with them in the past but at the time of talking to me, there was no beauty, authority, honour or power in their lives. They knew something left them. That's a pitiable condition for anyone who was once up there. It is only those that lack understanding about these things that will give in easily and cheaply because they lack in-depth knowledge and understanding about the dangers involved. *In a world where people see illicit sex as fun and sport, the devil will have a field day and free course in the lives of people to steal, kill and destroy.* God is calling all of us to a life of sexual purity. Knowing what you stand to lose, will you continue or repent? The choice is yours. I pray that you won't be a victim of the enemy's onslaught against men and women of destiny in Jesus name.



*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.10


Proverbs 6:32-33 But the man who commits adultery is an utter fool, for he destroys himself. He will be wounded and disgraced. His shame will never be erased. NLT



*SHAME AND WOUND*


Anytime king Solomon speaks especially on bedroom matters, I think it is wise to listen. He's a professor in that department. He learnt from his father what the consequences of sexual immorality are and from his own personal experience, he garnered a lot of experience on this subject. In the opening text, he revealed to us  a new dimension of consequences that comes with sexual immorality: Shame and wound. David is our prime example here. After committing sexual sin with Bathsheba which led him to kill Uriah the husband so that he can cover up his sin, God's anger was kindled against him greatly and the pronouncements of prophet Nathan were heavy in his life.





2Sam 12: 10- 11 *"Now, therefore, the sword will never depart from your house, because you despised me and took the wife of Uriah the Hittite to be your own."This is what the LORD says: `Out of your own household I am going to bring calamity upon you. Before your very eyes I will take your wives and give them to one who is close to you, and he will lie with your wives in broad daylight.*". Do you know that in David's life time, this evil pronouncements came to pass? Absalom, son of David, slept with his father's concubines on top of a roof for everyone to see (2 Sam16:22). This is shameful, disgraceful and heart rendering. This shameful record can never be erased in the history of David and his lineage little wonder why Solomon said in the opening text that the shame of a sexually immoral person will never be erased. Sometimes, the devil always factor in a lifetime shame for those that are sexually immoral. Imagine a married woman or man caught in adultery with images&video posted on the internet or a preacher enmeshed in serial sex scandals?



I have found Solomon's assertion to be true. Most people who have had a sexual scandal of some sort either in the distant past or recently always have shame  trailing behind them anywhere their name is mentioned. Even when they do exploits, the reporters will find a slot for their  shame in the report. When you go on the internet to check names of people( esp preachers) who once had a sex scandal, one way or the other, their sexual sin will be mentioned. *While God forgives and forget sexual sin just like other sins immediately after repentance is sought for, experience has shown that humans hardly forget*. I was talking to a denominational leader sometimes ago. In our conversation, there was a pastor who would have been recommended for a higher assignment in their church but because of his past sexual scandals, he was disqualified. They made it a rule in their church that whoever have had a scandal will never be their supreme spiritual leader. Though personally, I think that's too harsh because if he has genuinely repented and forgiven by God, he is like every other person who has never had a scandal but mankind hardly forgets such. That's the reproach that comes with sexual immorality. While it seems your secret is covered and you're getting away with your sexscapades in secret, the devil is planning to uncover it in a shameful way so that you won't recover in a lifetime. Satan may not stop a man from climbing the ladder of greatness if he sees that his appetite for sex is uncontrolled. The moment he gets to the top, he'll bring the person down and put a label of shame on him. *The works of the flesh( esp sexual immorality) that travel with men to the top is what brings them down eventually*.  This is part of what the enemy is planning. God is calling you and me to a life of purity. *Check that thing you call "weakness" now and allow God deal with it before it fetches shame and wound for you.*




*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.11

Romans 12:2 Don’t copy the behavior and customs of this world, but let God transform you into a new person by changing the way you think. Then you will learn to know God’s will for you, which is good and pleasing and perfect. NLT

*THE PATH TO VICTORY- CLOSE THE GATES*

Have you ever asked to know what the greatest sexual organ is? Most people would naturally assume that their private parts are the greatest sexual organ but that's not true. *The mind is the greatest sexual organ in your body*. That is the central control unit of all forms of sexual immorality. If it doesn't come from the mind, the body can do nothing. Some desire to be free truly but they do not know how. When Paul said that sexual purity is the will of God, he further said: *"that every one of you should KNOW HOW to possess his vessel in sanctification and honour;*"(1 Thessalonians 4:4 KJV). The victory over sexual immorality comes when you "know how" to configure the mind for purity. Whatever is not in the mind can never be done by the body. Proverbs 23:7 says, *"As a man thinks in his heart, so is he*" and as he continues to think in his mind, so he will remain.


The mind has two major entry gates:( a) the eyes and (b) the ears. *Whoever desires to configure the mind rightly should watch what goes into the mind through the eyes and ears*. The power of audiovisual is what the enemy is using to prepare the hearts of men for sexual immorality. That's why there's a touch of sex appeal on almost all adverts you see on t.v.and some radio adverts. They design such adverts to spark erotic feelings and emotions. Also, if you listen to the fast-selling songs in the entertainment world, often, they have sex appeal as a bait to generate traffic. The video vixens they use are almost stark naked. It is impossible to feed your eyes and ears with the junks of today and not be polluted in the mind. *The man that has mastered what he sees and hears has gained mastery over sexual immorality.* What are the images and content on your phone and laptops? Do you visit porn sites or take pleasure in looking at nudes? There are believers crying in prayer&fasting over their immoral lives but immediately after they leave the place of prayer, they return to their vomit and they keep asking "why". *The first battle you must conquer is the battle of the mind and the "how" is to close your eyes and ear gates against whatever has the capability to pollute the mind.*


Apostle Paul gave us a blue print on what to do after we have shut the eyes and ears against mind pollutants. In the opening text, he said we should renew our minds. The tense used for "renew" in the Greek is a present continuous tense. It means that on daily basis, we must renew our minds. It involves putting new stuff into our minds to replace the old dirty stuff. This will take a life time. As we do this daily, we weaken the hold of the flesh on our lives. The tool for that renewal is the word of God and other word- based edifying materials. There's power in stuffing your mind with the word. That's the game changer. After you've stopped looking and listening to immoral contents, the mind can't be left blank. In fact, no man can make the mind blank. What happens is that in the process of renewal, new stuff evicts the old ones gradually. In overcoming this battle of the mind, the Psalmist's counsel is valid: *"Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his way? by taking heed thereto according to thy word.*"( Psalms 119:9). The word should be given attention, that's how to guard the heart against pollutants. King Solomon further counseled: *"Keep thy heart with all diligence; For out of it are the issues of life.*" (Proverbs 4:23 KJV).


*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.12

1Cor 6:18 Run from sexual sin! No other sin so clearly affects the body as this one does. For sexual immorality is a sin against your own body.


*TAKE THE NEXT FLIGHT*



Of all the sins in the bible, the only sin we were told to flee from is the sin of  sexual  immorality. The Greek word "Pheugo"( flee, run, avoid) was used by Paul in the opening text deliberately. It has both figurative and literal meaning denoting avoidance or  escape. That was what Joseph did when Mrs Potiphar wanted to lure him to bed. Sexual emotions is so powerful such that you don't speak in tongues in the face of temptation. No amount of fire you carry, if you don't know how to take the next flight, you may become a victim. As said earlier, "Pheugo" doesn't necessarily mean running away physically ( though that should be done when needed), it is simply avoidance. In other words, ever before temptation comes, you have set healthy boundaries that will prevent you from falling. That is what it means to flee or run from sexual immorality. The statement is a statement of command. Running from sexual immorality is a must not optional especially in this perverse generation.



One of my role models in ministry once said that he will never employ a female secretary. That's his own method of "Pheugo". Don't say 'that's too harsh,' he knows his weaknesses and what may happen having a female secretary or P.A.going everywhere with him and being alone in the office till odd hours. Those who always think they can handle compromising situations always fall victim of sexual sin. If electric current surge through your body whenever you shake or hug a lady, it is in your best interest to avoid it.  Billy Graham and his team in their Modesto Manifesto decided they will never be alone with any woman aside their wife. Do you say it is extreme? Well, there's nothing that's too much to stay secure. The writer of Hebrew(12:4) said, *"Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin.*"


Don't be careless. It is dangerous to assume you don't need to avoid sexual immorality because of your spirituality or strength. Your strength against sexual immorality is in avoidance and taking bible based precaution. Don't tempt yourself with what you cannot handle saying "its no big deal". Why co habit with your fiancée saying "we have grace for self control". That grace will turn to disgrace very soon. Those dangerous body contacts can spark a flame that may not quench easily. You don't need to be told that you should never stay alone with the opposite sex. Even if you don't have feelings for each other, just avoid it, at least to avoid being raped. I see funny questions singles ask, "should we kiss in relationship "? My answer is always "don't kiss". I know some Christian marriage counselors are beginning to say things like "kiss if you can handle it". The flesh always think it can handle certain things like this but time has proven that the result is not always favourable. Dear, you cannot handle it. That's playing with fire and you'll burn. The bible says, *"Can a man scoop a flame into his lap and not have his clothes catch on fire?Can he walk on hot coals and not blister his feet?*" ( Prov6:27-28). You have the answer to those questions already. Don't try to manage that compromising situation. If that person around you is becoming an object of lust and fantasy, do all that is within your power to avoid him/ her. There are people you should avoid calling or chatting with because if you continue to do so, you'll be fanning the embers of lust. It is better to be safe than to be sorry. Flee!



*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.13

1 Cor 15:33 Do not be misled: “Bad company corrupts good character.”

*SEVER TIES*

I told us previously how I was entangled in the web of immorality in my secondary school days. Aside the fact that I backslid and turned away from my Christian consecration, one thing that worked against my purity was my association and circle of influence back then in school. Though my background was solid from home and it is what you'll call a Christian background. We pray and hear God's word as a family every morning and we pray together at night as a family. We go to church regularly and engage in all the activities but I was influenced wrongly. Most of the guys around me whom the devil used as a trigger didn't have my kind of background. They succeeded in influencing me wrongly. Not only that, i remember that those days, there was a man who motivated me in unrighteousness. He knew my girlfriend and he helped  strengthen the cord of our sinful relationship. You know young people love anyone that act like godfather for immorality. That is who the man was to me and the girl then. That's the power of association.


In your quest for sexual purity, you need to watch your association. If you move with those who don't value sexual purity, they may infect you with their lifestyle and sooner than you think, you'll find yourself doing what you didn't want to do. I noticed that those that are sexually immoral rarely do it alone. Often, they have a circle of evil encouragers. When Amnon was infatuated with Tamar, he didn't know how to go about it but he had a shrewd friend in Jonadab who counseled him on what to do to get Tamar to bed(2 Sam 13). I watched pornography because I had friends and older ones who watched porn. The first time I was introduced to porn, someone older sent me to get him a blue film(as we call it back then). I asked around and a girl was recommended to me. She promised to get me a porn video and she gave a VHS cassette. When we watched it, the video wasn't pornography. She was ignorant. This big brother still insisted I get him raw porn. Till that time, i didn't know what it was. The day I watched porn, no one needed to tell me the difference between fake and original. From that day, a demon entered me and I found myself hungry for more of pornography not until when Jesus came to deliver me. I'm only trying to explain the power of association.




Evaluate your association and be sure it is in line with your desire for sexual purity. Apostle Paul knew how infectious this sin is, that's why he said, *"I meant that you are not to associate with anyone who claims to be a believer yet indulges in sexual sin, or is greedy, or worships idols, or is abusive, or is a drunkard, or cheats people. Don’t even eat with such people.*"(1Cor 5:11). Paul, the apostle of grace spoke sternly against associating with immoral people. If you are walking on the path of sexual purity and your friends are sexually active, you're the next in line. As married folks, if your friends are engaged in extra marital affairs, they are already mentoring you for the same thing. You must break certain associations intentionally and relate with those who have kingdom values of sexual purity.




*PRAYER*: I refuse to be hunted, dominated and conquered on the bed of sexual immorality in the name of Jesus. I receive grace to conquer every demonic agent like Delilah sent on a mission to my life in Jesus name. My destiny and glory is preserved in Jesus name.

*LIVING PURE IN A SEX CRAZY WORLD* Pt.14

James 5:16 Therefore confess your sins to each other and pray for each other so that you may be healed. The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective. NIV

*OPEN UP AND BE ACCOUNTABLE*

The power of sexual immorality is in secrecy especially for believers who might be struggling in this area. There's a self deceit of "I'll overcome it alone". That alone is the major reason so many people are wallowing in sexual immorality especially Christian leaders. Spiritual pride wont't allow some brethren open up to those that can help them. I noticed that it is very hard for so many Christians to talk to someone about their struggles. From within, they are eaten up like the stem borer does to plants. The stem borer is an insect that bore holes in stems of plants and suck the vitality of that plant till it becomes weak. Such plants may be standing and good looking for a while but they lack the strength to withstand the wind.

To avoid being eaten up by secret sin of sexual immorality, you need someone in your life you can confide in. I don't mean someone who will mock and gossip you to others. Here, I'm talking about a mature person spiritually. Someone who can pray with you, counsel and hold you accountable. Also, the person should be able to tell you the plain truth( in love) and exercise disciplinary powers at least  to some extent. Not someone that will pamper you because he doesn't want to offend you. The burden on the heart of many people is always, "how do I get someone who fits for this"? Very simple! If you pray and ask the Holy Spirit to lead you, He will recommend one of His own. I have been in that shoes before but after seeking God's face sincerely, He led me to someone.


*The devil will always fight against exposing sexual sins because he knows that the power of perpetuity lies in secrecy*. Do you know you can conquer lust by exposing it? Often, you'll notice that those who abuse children sexually always threaten their victims not to tell anyone because they understand that as long as the secret is kept, they'll always have their way. That's the old trick of that accursed man. In your quest for lasting victory,  prayerfully confide in someone. *The day you expose your secret sexual sin, you break its backbone*.

Isaiah40:31, “But those who wait on the Lord shall renew their strength. They shall mount up with wings like eagles, they shall run and not be weary, they shall walk and not faint.” (Isaiah 40:31 NKJV).


*STRENGTHENED FOR A LIFE OF SEXUAL PURITY*

The power to say "No" can only come from a source that is celestial.

That's why no man should boast in his strength or ability. We are strengthened to stand by the most high. Walking with God one day at a time makes sin irritating; no man ever get to that point without a solid altar.

*THE POWER OF ONE* Pt.1


James 5:17 Elijah was a man just like us. He prayed earnestly that it would not rain, and it did not rain on the land for three and a half years.


Over 10 years ago, i received an invitation to preach to a small group of believers on a retreat. The topic my host gave me was "The Power of One". I asked to know what he meant and what the focus of the message was. He told me that the focus of the message should be on the exploits one man can do, a visionary man. I got his intention and I began to prepare. The opening text that came to mind was James 5:17, " Elijah was a man" not two or more persons were described to us but one man who prayed and stopped rain for years. Just one man, not a committee of men. I did a survey of great characters in the bible, they existed as one. They pioneered and started kingdom exploits as one with a vision before they mobilized others.




When God wanted to send His redemptive message to the Gentiles, he raised Paul and sent him there. Even at creation, God started with Adam first, later created Eve and then the rest of the world came from their loins.
When God needed a saviour for mankind, God didn't send two persons but one. It is consistent with the nature of God to always search for one man whenever He wants a task done. In Ezekiel22:30, God said, *"AND I SOUGHT FOR A MAN AMONG THEM, that should make up the hedge, and stand in the gap before me for the land, that I should not destroy it: but I found none.*" When Saul failed, God sought for a man and He found David worthy for the throne.



Now, don't misunderstand the import of this message, no single man can fulfill a great vision alone but a great vision need to start with one man before others can be part of it. There are vacancies in the realm of the spirit and heaven is shopping for one man who will replace. Start getting yourself prepared for the great deployment of God's sons into key tasks in the kingdom. This phase of life you call "suffering" or "delay" may be God's training process for a bigger task. God prepared David for the throne in the wilderness tending sheep because God had human sheep in mind. When the affairs of a nation has gone comatose, God won't send foreign help. He has always raised men and send them out to do His bidding but He always start with one. I am glad to tell you that God is looking for you, just you. There's a cry, "who shall we send"? As a man that God has invested so much in, respond to God's call saying " Here am I, send me".  Start getting prepared for destiny.


*PRAYER*: Father, here am I, send me.

*THE POWER OF ONE* Pt.2


James 5:17 Elijah was a man just like us. He prayed earnestly that it would not rain, and it did not rain on the land for three and a half years.

*VISION DRIVEN*


A careful study about men that shook their world and made impact as one revealed that they were driven by a vision. In context of our teaching, what is a vision? A vision is the revelation of God's plans and purposes to man. It is the unveiling of what God want you to do in life. That's vision. *A God-given vision is what you see yourself doing even when your eyes are closed*. It is what you see with your inner eyes and the prompting in your spirit-man about God's plan for your life. When God wanted to raise Paul(One man), He was given a vision and the pursuit of that vision is the reason we are reading about him today. When he stood trial before king Agrippa, he said, *“So then, King Agrippa, I was not disobedient to the vision from heaven."*(Acts26:19). Paul received from the Lord His assignment in life and he pursued it. The rest is history.


God-given vision has  four components: Insight( what you see within or the signals from your spirit man), hindsight ( what you see from your past that is of great relevance to the present), foresight( What you see ahead) and eye sight( what you see physically as the vision becomes a reality). We can't be talking about the great influence and power one man can wield if he doesn't have a God-given vision he's running with. When purpose of life is not discovered, life becomes meaningless and a burden. Men that impacted their world and changed the course of history are men who have a vision and are motivated by it. Though a great vision is received by one and the pursuit begins with one but the scope of a God-given vision attracts like minds and embraces vision helpers. One man catches a vision and others buy into it. Your place(divine purpose) in life must be discovered first before you can make any meaningful impact. Men without vision are lost in the crowd and they just make up the numbers.


Every great initiative starts with one man that has a burning vision in his heart. Desire to find God's placement for your life first and then pursue it. There's so much God has in mind for our world but only a few persons have pressed deep into God's mind to unravel them. *All the sectors of our society has a divine blue print, God is multi sectoral in His approach but most people always think about purpose and vision in terms of pulpit ministry. God prepared David for a political assignment, Daniel for public service though he was also a prophet. God want His reign and rule to permeate every sector of life and society.* Life on earth may not be perfect but should be a prototype of what obtains in heaven: *"Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*"(Matthew 6:10 KJV). This can only happen if kingdom people find their place and influence their world with a kingdom culture.  We are created to pick our life's assignment from God's table and start working on it. Such can only be delivered in the place of fellowship.


*PRAYER*: Holy Spirit, you are the revealer of truth. I ask that you reveal my life's assignment to me in Jesus name

DEVOTIONAL 0294 | Source start line: 27732

10/9/21, 1:45 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Saturday,
October 9th, 2021.

*THE POWER OF ONE* Pt.3

Phil 3:13 No, dear brothers and sisters, I have not achieved it, but I focus on this one thing: Forgetting the past and looking forward to what lies ahead,

*FOCUS- THE SECRET OF "ONE"*

Focus refers to the centre of interest of an individual or a group of persons. In becoming one person with remarkable exploit and impact, the power of focus is non negotiable. Apostle Paul knew he had an apostolic vision to reach the unreached places in his time especially among the Gentiles, he could have stayed in the rabbinical schools as a teacher of Jewish law or even as a Pastor over a congregation but because he had received a clear heavenly vision where life's purpose and assignment was delivered to him, he decided to be a man of one pursuit- apostolic ministry to the Gentiles. He went further to say, *"No, dear brothers and sisters, I have not achieved it, BUT I FOCUS ON THIS ONE THING: Forgetting the past and looking forward to what lies ahead,*", Phil3:13. No man living or dead who walked in God's plans and purposes was/is a man of two pursuit. It has always been on one thing.


*Focus is setting your gaze on the pursuit and realization of the vision God gave you and not looking elsewhere*. Jesus is a perfect example here. In John 6:15, we were told that they(Jews) wanted to make Jesus their king but he slipped away: *"When Jesus saw that they were ready to force him to be their king, he slipped away into the hills by himself.*" Is it bad to be a king? Of course it is not bad or sinful to become a king especially during His days when Romans ruled oppressively. He could have used His celestial powers to get that done and fulfill Isaiahic prophecies like: "And the government shall be upon his shoulders" but He( Jesus) knew that His vision was not to become an earthly king and His government was not that which the Jews wanted at that time but to save mankind. When He came on the scene, in Luke 19:10, He declared His purpose for coming to the earth saying, *"For the Son of Man has come to save that which was lost*”. That was His focus. Apostle Paul, speaking to the Corinthian believers in 1Cor1:17 said, *"FOR CHRIST DIDN'T SEND ME TO BAPTIZE, BUT TO PREACH THE GOOD NEWS—...*" Even though it is not bad to baptize people yet Paul said that was not his focus.


*Catching a divine vision for life will help you to know the limit of your assignment but focus will  help you to stay within that limit so that you can achieve that vision faster.* Until you consistently focus on one thing, your world cannot focus on you. Don't be here today and there tomorrow, stay on your lane in destiny. Don't be a Pastor today and become an Evangelist tomorrow if you're not called to do so. Stop shifting lanes because there are so many people on the next lane.  It may be a popular lane but it may not be your path.  A Yoruba adage says 'you can't chase two rats and catch any of them because they won't run in the same direction.' *Stop the pursuit of trends,  make your path to trend.* Focus on one vision rightly pursued is enough to make you leave your footprint in the sand of times.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to stay focused on my assignment and not to be distracted in Jesus name.

*THE POWER OF ONE* Pt.4

Proverbs 24:27 Prepare your work outside; get everything ready for yourself in the field, and after that build your house.



*PREPARATION*


I noticed that we humans don't joke with certain things especially when it touches on our lives and well being.  No one will submit his body to a doctor who didn't finish from medical school but is acclaimed as an expert. I'm sure you won't no matter how good he may be. Sometimes, people look for specialist doctors to treat their ailments not minding the cost. That doctor that is sought after is a product of quality training and adequate preparation. It is easy to examine men and women who left their footprint in the sand of times yet fail to look at how they were made. Adequate preparation for life and destiny is a vital key in becoming that influential personality that will touch lives and fulfill destiny. When apostle Paul got converted, he didn't just enter into apostolic ministry without preparation. He spent 3 years in Arabia( Gal1:17). As anointed as he was, he didn't launch out without preparation.


Jesus is one man whose impact is divine and eternal yet he didn't step out to start ministry not until when he was fully prepared and equipped at the age of 30.  A wise man said, *"proper prior preparation prevents poor performance*". No vision succeed without proper prior preparation. The moment you sense God's call into destiny, you need to start preparing yourself for it. To be fully prepared, you need to be trained. Thorough training is the vehicle of adequate preparation. There's nothing you want to do that you can't be trained for, absolutely nothing.One of the best counsel I ever received was the counsel to get quality training.



Jesus couldn't release the disciples into the field of souls for world harvest not until they were prepared and equipped with power. *God is not in a hurry. Though you are needed to fulfill destiny so that this world can experience the kingdom culture yet God won't release you to perform on the big stage until you're prepared*. David's preparatory phase was in the wilderness. When he killed a lion and bear, he didn't know that God was preparing him to kill a human lion by the name Goliath. He tended the sheep of his father not knowing he will lead the flock of God's people. You will not operate in the fullness of God's plan without adequate preparation. *A genuine vision can become an illusion when the element of preparation is missing.*


*PRAYER*: Father, I receive grace to submit myself to training so that I can be prepared for life and destiny in Jesus name.

Monday,
October 11th,  2021.

*THE POWER OF ONE* Pt.5

Matthew 4:19 “Come, follow me,” Jesus said, “and I will send you out to fish for people.”

*"ONE" WITH VISION HELPERS*

Though we have been examining the making of "one", we must also realize that God can deliver great visions to a singular entity but no individual can fulfill God's plan all alone. I am yet to see one great man who was a lone ranger in life and matters of destiny. Jesus was one man who came to the world with a clear mandate, he knew he came to seek and save the lost. The vision was clear but He went out of His way to seek for people He can disciple for the pursuit of that vision. He went everywhere calling a selected number of persons to become His disciples. Why? So that when He is gone, they will carry on the task and fulfill His vision. Today, we are products of that vision that was handed down to the disciples.




*One man is free to catch a vision and discover purpose but he is not permitted to run with the vision alone else he'll make a mess of the vision*. David was a one man army raised by God in the wilderness to disgrace Goliath. He achieved that feat with ease but when the vision expanded beyond killing Goliath, God sent some beleaguered men to him for training in 1Sam 22:2: *"Then others began coming—men who were in trouble or in debt or who were just discontented—until David was the captain of about 400 men.*" Later these men were later called the mighty men of David in 2Sam 23:8-36. At first, they were beleaguered but after buying into the vision of David, they became mighty men on their own. *Calling people to be part of your vision is not an opportunity to "use" them but it is a responsibility placed on your shoulders to "make" them. When Jesus called the twelve to be fishers of men, He said, "I will make you" not "I will use you". Start making men and stop using them.


*The perpetuity of your vision lies in making men who will carry on with the task.* Start praying and mobilizing. Even if God has called you into politics, you cannot do it alone. You need a large number of like minds who share your vision, ethos of governance and style. I have told several persons that one good leader can change Nigeria but not without having the support of majority across the different political structures. That good man/ leader need to have the majority behind him at the ward level, in the house of assemblies and ensure that those who are key to his vision see things from his point of view. Until that is in place, the vision remains an illusion. For whatever assignment God has committed into your hands, start raising men who will buy into that vision and run with it.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to influence others with the vision you gave me in Jesus name

10/12/21, 5:18 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
October 12th, 2021.

*RELATIONSHIPS THAT WON'T WORK* Pt.1

1 John 4:16 "And so we know and rely on the love God has for us. God is love. Whoever lives in love lives in God, and God in them."

*WHERE TRUST IS LACKING*

When i talk about a relationship that won't work, I am not talking about a relationship that won't end in marriage. That's not what I mean. There are relationships or courtships that ended in marriage yet, they're not working out well. Those relationships are strained and stressed because certain things are missing. Somehow, when singles get certain things right in courtship before marriage, they're likely to have a marriage that will work. In courtship, it is expected that the foundation for a solid marriage is laid. I was talking to an elderly man who told me marriage is a black market. Though I didn't object openly because he may see it as being rude but I didn't agree with that ideology.  *For a child of God, marriage is not a black market when the Holy Spirit and sanctified/biblical common sense is involved in the choice making*. People often ignore the place of the Spirit and the warning signs He gives before signing the dotted lines.


*A relationship that won't work out well is a relationship where trust is lacking*. I once read about a man who sniffed the panties of his wife trying to perceive the odour of condom. That's abnormal. He lived with his wife in perpetual suspicion. Due to lack of trust, some men prevent their wives from working. They believe exposure to the corporate world will make her cheat. In this days of technology, some track each other's calls and read SMS secretly always looking for evidences to validate their suspicion. As a single, if you find yourself in a relationship with someone whose attitude is to suspect and monitor you despite being truthful and clean, that relationship won't work even if angel Michael conduct your wedding service. It could also happen the other way. If you've lost the trust you have for your fiancé/fiancée because of certain negative things you saw(with evidences) and repentance is not in place, the tendency to always suspect that person is high even if you continue with the relationship.

*To singles reading this piece, the simple rule of thumb here is this: Don't marry someone you can't trust and someone that doesn't trust you*. Marriage can be miserable if trust is lacking. Some are incurably suspicious of their mate, even if their partner has proven to be trustworthy, they'll make life unbearable for the person. Those in this shoe knows how it feels. *Where trust is lacking, love would be missing*. Don't manage a relationship where trust issues is a reoccurring problem. It doesn't always work out well. That is not to say you should be foolish. While in courtship, if your partner has proven to be untrustworthy consistently, you don't need a special counseling session to tell you what to do. A balance must be maintained here. *Marriage is for those that can trust and are trustworthy*.



*ACTION POINT*: Do I trust him/ her enough to be my spouse? If you're struggling to trust him/ her, you may need to reconsider your decision. If your fiancé/fiancée is always suspicious of you despite being clean,  you may need to reconsider your relationship again.

DEVOTIONAL 0298 | Source start line: 27997

10/13/21, 5:52 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Wednesday,
October 13th, 2021.

*RELATIONSHIPS THAT WON'T WORK* Pt.2

Amos 3:3 Can two people walk together without agreeing on the direction? NLT

*WHERE THERE'S NO AGREEMENT*


Years back,  a relationship between a brother and sister crashed because there was no agreement on tithing. This sister hold tithing so dear as though heaven depended on it but this brother doesn't share the same view so they parted ways. I heard about a couple whose marriage became an oven of chaos because of vigil. The man married his wife from a church where ladies are permitted to attend vigil but in this man's church, ladies don't attend vigils. They failed to iron the issue out in courtship before proceeding to the altar. As little as some of these issues raised may sound, when there's no proper agreement between couples and those intending to marry on vital issues of life and faith, their relationship won't work.


*Why some relationships won't work is because there's no agreement on issues of life, faith, career progress,  location and purpose*. Marriage is not what you enter into on the basis of assumption neither do you feel your way through into it. *Courtship requires frank talk*. Some issues causing friction in several marriages are issues that would have been resolved in courtship before entering into marriage. Sometimes, you may need to disagree respectfully to agree,  that's reaching a compromise. Courtship period is the time for frank talk not the time to discuss sweet nonsense. In courtship, It is easier you agree on issues or make a u-turn if agreement is not reached than in marriage. *Crisis and occasional quarrels is what you'll have in marriage when you try to raise vital issues that ought to have been settled in courtship*. As a minister of the Gospel, I've seen this several times in counseling.

*The assumption that your partner knows what ought to be and how things should be is a costly assumption*. Some men run their homes the way they saw their dad run his. There are young men towing the same path but unknown to their fiancée. Same applies to the ladies. Sometimes, people's views on issues are formed by their background, environment and experiences in life. On its own, that will cause disagreement when relating with others. You need to develop a relational skill on presenting issues objectively and stirring reasoning in the other person for agreement or compromise to be reached. That you both have different views on certain issues isn't bad. It is normal. Where the problem lies is when the other person becomes consistently unreasonable on issues that requires mutualism and when you also have a rigid stance on issues that requires a healthy compromise. It takes the agreement of two to make a relationship work, where there's no agreement, it is unwise to forge ahead.

*ACTION POINT*: According to Pst Temi Ola, 'courtship' as a word has the prefix "Court". In court, you examine, cross examine and re examine. Ensure your examine, cross examine and re examine issues to reach a healthy agreement before boarding the ship of marriage.

*RELATIONSHIPS THAT WON'T WORK* Pt.3


Gen 2:18 Then the LORD God said, “It is not good for the man to be alone. I will make a helper who is just right for him.”


*WHERE PURPOSE IS NOT DEFINED*




When I wanted to marry, one thing I settled with my wife was about the direction in which God was leading me. Though as at then, I thought I'll be in academia partly but I knew that there's nothing I'll do in life without preaching the Gospel. Long before I left campus, I knew that I had an assignment in ministry which must be fulfilled. I remember vividly that the day she visited our house for the first time, I heard my mom telling her that "my son has a ministry". She said that to lay emphasis on my purpose and assignment in life so that the future won't be strange to her. I thank God I married my wife. After God, I wouldn't be doing what I'm doing today if not for her support. *No man is fit to marry until purpose is discovered and defined. Purpose discovery leads to spouse discovery.*



One vital aspect of marriage that is often neglected is the aspect of God ordained purpose for marriage and for those going into marriage. There's a general purpose God had in mind for marriage because He is the founder of the marriage institution not man. God will never institute a thing without a clear purpose in mind. God is purposeful and intentional in all He does. From scriptures, it is made clear that God primarily instituted marriage for companionship, to maintain sexual purity and lastly for procreation. This is just general purpose. For the individuals going into marriage, God  have specific/ peculiar purpose for their union and this is connected to their personal assignment in life and ministry.



*When marriage is not contracted with the understanding of God's purpose, the relationship may not work*. The pursuit of purpose fuels love between couples. I have seen couples who separated partly because the husband became a pastor but the wife wasn't ready to give her support. That can happen in any marriage where the two are going in different directions or do not understand and accept each other's assignment in life.  Support will be lacking in such marriage. I am not saying that the purpose of the two going into marriage must be exactly the same rather it must complement each other. The glorious destinies of some brothers and sisters died the very day they entered into marriage with someone who does not accept their life's assignment. All through the marriage, they keep struggling to revive their dream but the killer of that dream sleeps with them on the bed.   *Marriage should not kill your individual uniqueness and assignment, it should enhance it.* The moment you enter or you're about entering into courtship, this issue must be settled to be sure that marriage will not be a burial ground of all that God has endowed and invested into your life.


*ACTION POINT*: If you're yet to enter into a relationship, settle with God the direction He want you to follow in life. If you're in courtship, settle the issue of your life's purpose together and be sure there's support for the direction you're heading towards.
