DEVOTIONAL 0673 | Source start line: 62482
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10/22/22, 7:40 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Saturday,
October 22nd, 2022.

*PROFITABLE USE OF THE MIND*

Isaiah 26:3 *Thou wilt keep him in perfect peace, whose mind is stayed on thee: because he trusteth in thee*.

Your mind is the seat of warfare against guilt and condemnation. How you feel is a function of what you feed your mind on.

*Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it* (Proverbs 4:23 NIV). Every thing flows from your heart.

Same applies to worry. Those who worry often feed their minds on negative things. Satan amplifies their fears and makes it look real. Thinking on those things is an unprofitable use of the mind.

Apostle Paul made it clear that this is warfare. The battle or warfare of the mind is the greatest form of warfare there be. Physical warfare is a product of internal warfare.

The first attack Satan launches is always against our minds. Paul says, *"The weapons we fight with are not the weapons of the world. On the contrary, they have divine power to demolish strongholds. We demolish ARGUMENTS and every pretension that sets itself up against the knowledge of God, and we take captive EVERY  THOUGHT to make it obedient to Christ (2 Corinthians 10:4-5 NIV).

Reading the scripture above, it is clear that words like "arguments", "knowledge", "thoughts" reveals the nature of warfare Paul meant. It is an internal warfare. A battle that rages in the mind.

*Whenever you feel condemned, accused by Satan and feel guilty for sins you've repented of, that's a signal of serious warfare going on in the mind*.

However, those things also linger because we pay attention to the wrong stuff. When the enemy brings the visual display of our past to us in our hearts, If we watch it and fellowship with it long enough, they become a stronghold in our hearts.

Demons can also torment people in their minds. Saul is an example here: “Now the Spirit of the LORD had left Saul, and the LORD sent a tormenting spirit that filled him with depression and fear.” (1 Sam 16:14NLT)

Some persons with mental issues, fear and depression are under serious demonic torments in their minds. No matter how doctors try, they won't be able to help them. I've heard of bible quoting & tongue speaking psychiatric patients.

The mind is powerful and how we use it determines to a large extent how we'll turn out.

*Your dominant thought is a function of the things you feed your mind on.* Some have never experienced the joy of the Lord in a long while because their dominant thoughts are on those who hurt them. Their spiritual strength is gone.

And without the joy of the Lord, where is their strength supposed to come from? After all, as Nehemiah 8:10 tells us, *“For the joy of the LORD is your strength*.”

*Once the enemy can get you to take your focus off the finished work of Christ on the cross and your new creation status, he'll always win that warfare that's going on in your mind*.

*One of the biggest differences between a victorious believer and a depressed or defeated believer, is the very thoughts that go through their mind day after day*.

If you're fighting serious battles in your mind and your thoughts are always unbiblical, what should you do?

All you need do is to refocus your mind on what Christ has done for you on the cross. Think more on the word and confess it. Your thinking and confession must align with the word.

Instead of saying, "I am a sinner", say "I am the righteousness of God in Christ". Instead of saying, "poor me", simply say "I'm God's delight".

*Those who think about the wonders of the cross will never fall victim of the enemy's dirty dozens in their minds*.

Paul told us what we should be thinking about: *"Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things are honest, whatsoever things are just, whatsoever things are pure, whatsoever things are lovely, whatsoever things are of good report; if there be any virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things*"( Philippians 4:8).

You have to exercise your mind consciously on things that are heavenly and on those things written about you in the word of God.

*“Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth.” To set your affection on something in the Greek means to exercise the mind* ( Colossians 3:2).

Don't look at the problem, look at the solution. Don't be so burdened about life. The word of God has the cure for that.

1 Peter 5:7, *“Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you*”.

Use your mind profitably by dwelling on God's word.

*CONFESSION*: I am the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. My sins are paid for a d washed away by the blood. I'm no longer on the guilt street. I'm on the lane of victory over sin, Satan and sickness. I am justified by the blood. My past is erased and I'm a new creation. Hallelujah!!!

N:B You can support our mission outreaches to the unreached and unsaved across Africa. Feel free to send your support to:

2023885279
First Bank of Nigeria.
Projectsave Int'l ministry

Shalom

DEVOTIONAL 0674 | Source start line: 62564
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10/23/22, 8:39 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Sunday,
October 23rd, 2022.

*STOP DOUBTING HIS MERCY*

Proverbs 28:13, *He that covereth his sins shall not prosper: but whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall have mercy*


I've heard several guilt-ridden believers say, "Maybe God hasn't forgiven me of my past sins". Some still live under the torment of somethings they've done in their past.

Now, these are born again, tongue-talking and devoted believers yet they live in doubt of God's mercy. Some never really believed they have become new creations. They live a defeated and weak life.

No thanks to religion and religious people who makes forgiveness look like "hardwork" involving rituals. In my few years as a believer, I've heard several theories on how to obtain forgiveness.

Some persons still believe until you fast and pray, the blood cannot cleanse you. I understand the place of penitence and all that yet the biblical prescription for receiving forgiveness is simple- CONFESS& FORSAKE.

Proverbs 28:13, *"...but whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall have mercy*

*If you can confess it, you can be forgiven of it*! 1 John 1:says, *“IF WE CONFESS our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from ALL unrighteousness*.”

Regardless of what you've done, If you can confess it to God& forsake it, you will receive full pardon. There is no sin too great for God to forgive.

Isaiah 1:18 says, *“Come now, and let us reason together, saith the LORD: though your sins be as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they be red like crimson, they shall be as wool*”.

*The only sin God can’t forgive, is the one you won’t take to Him.* Satan is working hard to make believers doubt God's mercy. Some think we water down the Gospel when we talk about God's mercy and the provisions we have in redemption.

Those who understand the riches of redemption and realize the love and goodness of God will never play with sin. The love of God leads us to genuine repentance.

Romans 2:4 says, *“Or despisest thou the riches of his goodness and forbearance and longsuffering; not knowing that the goodness of God leadeth thee to repentance*?”

Jeremiah 31:3, *“…Yea, I have loved thee with an everlasting love: therefore with lovingkindness have I drawn thee*.”

The love of God is to draw us back to God. Christianity is the only faith that understands God's love this way. Other religion doubt God's love and mercy. They try to earn it with works yet they always feel they're not doing enough.

You can't do enough to earn God's love. The love of God for mankind is a deep mystery that can only be revealed by the Spirit of God via His word.

Paul prayed thus, *"And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.” If you want to be filled with the fullness of God, you need to understand this great love that God has for you*"( Ephesians 3:19).

I love the way prophet Isaiah express this crucial point: *“Therefore the LORD longs to be gracious to you, And therefore He waits on high to have compassion on you. For the LORD is a God of justice; How blessed are all those who long for Him*" (Isaiah 30:18 NASB).

In Luke 7, Jesus took a very sinful woman (likely a prostitute) and freely washed her clean without hesitation! Luke 7:47, *“Wherefore I say unto thee, Her sins, which are many, are forgiven; for she loved much: but to whom little is forgiven, the same loveth little*".

Even in death, while Jesus was hanging on the cross, a murderer/criminal next to him received mercy. Jesus said unto him, *“Verily I say unto thee, To day shalt thou be with me in paradise*” (Luke 23:43).

Genuine repentance brings joy to God: “Likewise, I say unto you, there is joy in the presence of the angels of God over one sinner that repenteth*"( Luke 15:10). If truly there's joy in heaven when a sinner repent, why are you in doubt about God's forgiveness?

When God forgives, He also FORGETS our sins! He chooses not to remember our sins for HIS own sake!

Isaiah 43:25 says, *“I, even I, am he that blotteth out thy transgressions for mine own sake, and will not remember thy sins*” (Also see Hebrews 10:17).

Psalms 103:12 says,  *“As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us*”.

Micah 7:19, *“…he will have compassion upon us; he will subdue our iniquities; and thou wilt cast all their sins into the depths of the sea*”.

Since God deem it fit to forget our sins, why should we bring them to rememberance after we have confessed and forsaken them?

*ACTION POINT*: Meditate on all the scriptures cited.

10/24/22, 6:20 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Monday,
October 24th, 2022.

*IN CHRIST REALITIES* Pt.1

2 Corinthians 5:17, “Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: old things are passed away; behold, all things are become new.”

*YOU ARE A NEW CREATURE*

One truth that is hard for some believers to accept is that they are new. They look at themselves from the standpoint of someone that is refurbished. That view downplays the finished work of Christ on the cross.

*A believer is not refurbished. A believer is not just a forgiven sinner saved by grace. A believer is a new specie created in righteousness and true holiness.*

Ephesians 4:24 says, *“And that ye put on the new man, which after God is created in righteousness and true holiness*”.


The bible says you are a new creature
A new man. Your old life and it's record no longer exist. You have a new nature in you because your old life has been crucified with Christ.

Apostle Paul, speaking in Galatians 2:20 says, *“I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the faith of the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself for me*”.

Hallelujah!!! You are a brand new man. It is hard for religion to accept this truth because religion always seek to earn salvation through works instead of accepting what Christ has done.
Religion makes people pay to earn forgiveness instead of pointing them to the man who paid for their sins on the cross. Religion never gives men the assurance of salvation because they're not sure where they belong.

The reason some believers are always feeling down, defeated, condemned and guilty is because they haven't accepted what Christ has done for them on the cross. Failure to accept this truth will make  you to be defeated perpetually.



*New birth is the real birth*. Jesus used the term 'born again" deliberately because that is what happens to anyone who gives his/her life to Christ. God didn't repair us, we are born anew. You are not a refurbished creation.

John 3:5-7 says, *“Jesus answered, Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born of water and of the Spirit, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God. That which is born of the flesh is flesh; and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit. Marvel not that I said unto thee, Ye must be born again*”.


Every child is born into a family. You are now born into God's family and the power of sonship is yours now.

John 1:12-13 says, *“But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God, even to them that believe on his name: Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God*".

Hallelujah!!! If you see yourself the way God sees you and you start living your new creation status, you cannot be defeated. *Your faith is weak because you don't know who you are in Christ*.

The devil takes advantage of your ignorance to make your faith weak. That's why he'll always want to shift your focus from truths revealed in scriptures so that you can feel downcast and guilty.


*CONFESSION*: I am a new creation. I'm a brand new man. Old things are passed away, I'm born again. At the cross, God didn't repair me neither did he refurbish me. A new me was born into God's family. I can boldly call God my father, I am His child. I am the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. I am triumphant!

DEVOTIONAL 0676 | Source start line: 62764
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10/25/22, 6:41 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
October 25th, 2022.

*IN CHRIST REALITIES* Pt.2

Romans 3:22, *Even the righteousness of God which is by faith of Jesus Christ unto all and upon all them that believe: for there is no difference*

*YOU ARE RIGHTEOUS*

Imagine a criminal in a court room about to be sentenced to death but declared innocent and free suddenly because someone paid the price and took his place. That's exactly what happened when we gave our lives to Christ and were made righteous.

We were guilty and filthy. Our sins deserved eternal punishment because justice must be served. However, sinless Christ came and satisfied the demands of justice. He took our place in punishment and gave us his own righteousness. Now, God has declared us innocent and free of all our past sins.

*Therefore, since we have been justified through faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ,*( Romans 5:1 NIV,?.

One hard truth religion can't accept is about our imputed righteousness. When we came to Christ, the very righteousness of Christ was imputed to us. Jesus took our sins and gave us his own righteousness. Hallelujah!!!

In 2 Corinthians 5:21, apostle Paul says, *"God made him who had no sin to be sin for us, so that in him we might become the righteousness of God*".

Glory be to God! *A great exchange occured at calvary. Our sin was exchanged for Christ's righteousness*. At that point on the cross, the weight and filth of our sins on Christ brought him serious agony.

The price for our righteousness ( justification) was paid with the blood of Jesus.Romans 3:25 says, *“Whom God hath set forth to be a propitiation through faith in his blood, to declare his righteousness for the remission of sins that are past, through the forbearance of God*”.

This righteousness is not like a filthy rag. It is human righteousness that is like a filthy rag. Self righteousness always fall short of the standard of God that's why it'll always be a filthy rag before God.

*But we are all as an unclean thing, and all OUR righteousnesses are as filthy rags; and we all do fade as a leaf, and our iniquities, like the wind, have taken us away*( Isaiah 64:6).

Religion loves to cloth people with the garment of self righteousness yet in the place of prayer, they feel inadequate about the same righteousness. You'll hear statements like: "We are all sinners".

I can't imagine how God will feel hearing those whom Christ paid the price of blood calling themselves sinners. Often, this is done or said to sound "humble" but that's not biblical humility. *A saint washed by the blood is no longer a sinner*.

The gift of righteousness makes us different from those without Christ. This righteousness is a gift from Christ to us. We didn't work for it.

Romans 5:17 says, *“For if by one man’s offense death reigned by one; much more they which receive abundance of grace and of the gift of righteousness shall reign in life by one, Jesus Christ*”.

Hallelujah!!! We now have access to the throne room of heaven. We can come into God's very presence without any feeling of guilt and shame for our past. You are not a sinner, you are a saint.

*You are not refurbished or re branded. You are new creation, a new man, a specie that was born anew. That's what we mean when we say we are "born again". Hallelujah!!!*

Faith alone in the finished work of Christ is what makes you righteous. No ritual ceremony required. You don't need a priest to declare you righteous neither do you need to buy indulgence or do penance to get this gift.

This is the truth that surfaced during reformation that made the protestants suffer serious attack yet this truth has survived for ages because it is timeless.

This truth is what the apostles of old preached and taught that made the religious people of their day persecute them. They don't believe righteousness can be this cheap.

Really it is not cheap because the price of blood was paid. Someone paid the price for to get it cheap. Our faith in Christ alone is enough to get this gift.

The enemy doesn't want you to see this redemptive provision so that you can remain subservient to religious rites and rituals and still remain guilty and condemned perpetually.

Tell yourself, "I am righteous".

*CONFESSION*: I am the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. The very righteousness of Christ is imputed to me. I'm not struggling to be righteous because I am already. I am born again, I'm more than a conqueror. I live above sin because the righteousness of Christ is mine. Hallelujah!!!


*Kindly listen to this audio message by Bro Lanre*👇🏽👇🏽👇🏽

*REASONS GOOD PEOPLE MARRY BAD PEOPLE*

https://t.me/projectsaveministries/45

10/26/22, 6:38 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Wednesday
October 26th, 2022.

*IN CHRIST REALITIES* Pt.3

Ephesians 2:6, *And hath raised us up together, and made us sit together in heavenly places in Christ Jesus*.

*SEATED WITH CHRIST- POSITION OF AUTHORITY*

I watched a short playlet years back. In that playlet, a brother was tormented by demons in his sleep. Whenever he was awake, he'll cry and shout "demons".

This experience reoccurred several times. After a while, he realized he had authority as a child of God. When those demons returned, he sent them out using his believer's authority.

In redemption, every believer is seated with Christ in heavenly places above principalities and power. That's the place of power and authority.


Some have misinterpreted this to mean that the believer is already in heaven. That's not true. You're still on earth. *To be seated with Christ in heavenly places depicts a position of enormous power and authority*.

*The power available to the believer is enormous. However, power is not useful until delegated. Delegated power is what we call authority.* When a demand is placed on power by putting it to use, then it becomes authority.

Demons are no longer superior because where you are  is higher than where they are. Jesus didn't say we'll beg demons.
I bleed within when I see Christians who "respect" Satan and demons more than they exercise their authority over him. It is a big shame.

This is what Jesus said about you and me: *"These miraculous signs will accompany those who believe: THEY WILL CAST OUT DEMONS IN MY NAME, and they will speak in new languages*" (Mark 16:17 NLT).

In the new testament, we weren't told that someone was tagged a "deliverance minister". Everyone who knew their place of authority in the early church sent demons packing.

Our generation has given primacy to a selected few we call "deliverance minister". I haven't said God does not anoint people specially for exorcism.

However, a child of God should be able to cast out demons without seeking for the help and support of a deliverance minister here and there. *The authority to deal with demons has been given to us all. Hallelujah!!!*

Positionally,  we are seated in a place of authority over all sickness, diseases and demons.

*Look, I have given you authority over all the power of the enemy, and you can walk among snakes and scorpions and crush them. Nothing will injure you*( Luke 10:19 NLT).

You can look at the devil in the face and say "Get lost". *Believers linger in demonic oppression because of ignorance not because Satan is so powerful*.

Satan knows this redemptive provision is available to every child of God but he'll ensure to downplay these truths so that we can remain in bondage.

*In Christ, you have authority to deal with Satan and his cohorts. He is a defeated foe trying to appear as the all-powerful.* On the cross, his backbone was broken and Christ got the victory for us.

*In this way, he disarmed the spiritual rulers and authorities. He shamed them publicly by his victory over them on the cross*( Colossians 2:15 NLT).

When he arose, he said, *"...All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth*"(Matthew 28:18 KJV). We are partakers of that power. It is available to us.

Paul, in his prayer for the Ephesian believers said: *"the eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints, and what is the EXCEEDING GREATNESS OF HIS POWER TO US-WARD WHO BELIEVE, according to the working of his mighty power, which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set him at his own right hand in the heavenly places*"(Ephesians 1:18‭-‬20 KJV).

The power available to us as believers is exceedingly great. Use your authority in Christ.

*PRAYER*: You demonic forces tormenting my life( mention areas of concern) I send you out of my life, health, marriage, business, family, ministry in Jesus name.

10/27/22, 6:31 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Thursday,
October 27th 2022.

*IN CHRIST REALITIES* Pt.4

1 Corinthians 6:20, *For ye are bought with a price: therefore glorify God in your body, and in your spirit, which are God’s*.

*BOUGHT WITH A PRICE*

Our ministry partnered with a missionary working among a tribe that sells young girls to old men for marriage. The girl sold is called "Money wife."

The fathers of those young girls sold into early marriage did so either to get some money to buy alcohol or as a repayment for debt. Some girls were sold as early as 2 years into the hands of cruel husbands.

However, when this missionary began his redemptive assignment, he was able to buy back some of these girls. He paid the price of money to buy them back.

His redemptive assignment was not without a price. At times, he almost paid the price of his own life because his life was threatened.

Your redemption for eternal hell is not free. All the benefits of grace you're enjoying now didn't come cheap. Jesus paid the price for it with His own blood.

Revelations 5:9 says, *“And they sung a new song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed (meaning purchased) us to God by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation*”( Emphasis mine).


*The price of blood was paid for your redemption*. Why did He go to that extent? Why did he sacrifice His life and spill His blood for your redemption? Love is it.

Romans 5:8 says, *“But God commendeth his love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us*”.

*You are loved deeply by God.* When the enemy comes to show you your past, condemning and accusing you, remind him about the blood that was used to purchase your redemption.

*Satan hates the blood of Jesus Christ.*

*And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and strength, and the kingdom of our God, and the power of his Christ: for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our God day and night. And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the death* ( Revelation 12:10-11 KJV).

Now that you're saved, you don't play with sin because what you got cheaply was paid for with a precious substance- the blood of Jesus Christ.

1 Corinthians 6:20 says, *“For ye are bought with a price: therefore glorify God in your body, and in your spirit, which are God’s*".

There's a demand on you to value the blood that bought you and to live in a way that will bring glory to God.

*CONFESSION*: I am bought with the price of blood. I'm a new man. I'm born again, I'm a new creation. The price paid for my salvation is beyond what money can buy. I live my life to glorify God.

10/28/22, 6:31 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
October 28th, 2022.

*IN CHRIST REALITIES* Pt.5

Romans 5:1, *Therefore being justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ*.

*PEACE WITH GOD*

I watched the video of a Hindu festival that attracted a crowd of over 80 million people from all over India. We were told it is the largest religious gathering in the world.

The festival holds for a week and in one single week, people from different parts of India come for spiritual cleansing at river Ganges.

One of the young men who granted interview was asked why he came to the river to bath. He said he has done alot of bad stuff so he needed cleansing to be forgiven and to have peace of mind( paraphrase).


He lacked peace in his heart. He sounded unsure about whether he'll still be forgiven after the whole exercise. Peace was lacking because the rituals didn't guarantee lasting forgiveness and peace with God.

The case is different with us. When we come under the cleansing blood of Christ, our peace with God is activated immediately. It is not something we try to make up, it is what we have. We know this and accept it by faith.

As believers, we are entitled to a clean conscience not because nothing happened in the past or because we are perfect. We are entitled to a clean conscience because the blood of Christ purges our conscience.

Hebrews 9:14 days,  *“How much more shall the blood of Christ, who through the eternal Spirit offered himself without spot to God, purge your conscience from dead works to serve the living God*?”

God seeks to get closer to us but Satan is always looking for excuses to break that relationship and to take our peace from us.

In order for us to have peace with God, He began to reconcile the world to Himself through Christ so that He won't count men's sins against them.

*For God was in Christ, reconciling the world to himself, no longer counting people’s sins against them. And he gave us this wonderful message of reconciliation*(2 Corinthians 5:19 NLT).

Hallelujah!!! If God is no longer counting the sins of the believer against him, then peace with God is assured through Christ.

Unbelievers need to hear this message. That God is no longer counting sins against those who have Jesus.

Religion makes people live in perpetual guilt and fear. Religion uses fear factor to hold her people down to unfruitful religious rituals.

The only man that should lack peace with God is the man without Christ. Unbelievers will remain troubled because all their sacrifices, rituals and doings are inadequate to earn salvation.

Your case is different child of God. You have peace with God through Christ.


*CONFESSION*: I have peace with God. I am not troubled by my past. I am a brand new man, a new creation. My past is erased and my sins are no longer part of me. Hallelujah!!! I am in Christ, Christ is in me.

DEVOTIONAL 0680 | Source start line: 63363

10/29/22, 7:05 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Saturday,
October 29th, 2022.

*WHY THE WORLD NEED JESUS* Pt.1

Romans 3:23 for all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God; KJV

*FOR ALL HAVE SINNED*

In one of our trips to the mission field, one of my team members asked what brought me to the place we went.

He was surprised that I left Lagos and went to a village in North Central part of Nigeria.

The very thing driving me to go round is because of what the bible says about sinners and those without Christ.

I'm trusting God to share with you why you need to be proactive in evangelism& missions.

Some persons may wonder why we are passionate about preaching the Gospel. There are believers who are getting tired of our repeated emphasis on reaching out to the lost.

There seem to be a revival of evangelism all around us. God is calling sons into the field to win souls in cities and villages yet some have not joined the train.

The first reason why the world need Jesus is because all have sinned. Romans 3:23 says, *"FOR ALL HAVE SINNED, and come short of the glory of God; KJV

This is the original sin we all inherited from Adam that was passed down from one generation to the next and still ongoing.

Romans 5:12 says, *"When Adam sinned, sin entered the world. Adam’s sin brought death, so death spread to everyone, for everyone sinned*".

The sin of Adam made everyone a sinner. Everyone in the world became a prisoner of sin: *"But the Scriptures declare that we are all prisoners of sin, so we receive God’s promise of freedom only by believing in Jesus Christ*"( Gal 3:22 NLT).

New born babies are partakers of this sin even though they are innocent. The Psalmists says, *"For I was born a sinner— yes, from the moment my mother conceived me*"( Psalms 51:5 NLT).

*No human was born sinless*. There's nothing like "I was born again from my mother's womb". It is anti scriptures. In sin we were conceived including children of Pastors.

The only person who can rescue us from the consequences of original sin inherited from Adam is Jesus. He was born sinless.

*"For God made CHRIST, WHO NEVER SINNED, to be the offering for our sin, so that we could be made right with God through Christ*" (2 Corinthians 5:21 NLT).

Hallelujah!!! Christ is without sin. That's what qualifies Him to save every sinner. *It is only the sinless one that can save the sinful one*. That's why He is a unique high priest

Hebrews 4:15 says, *"This High Priest of ours understands our weaknesses, for he faced all of the same testings we do, yet he did not sin*".

The world is looking for a way out of sin. The sinner needs salvation through a saviour. The only saviour that can rescue the world from sin and its consequences is Jesus Christ.

*For you know that God paid a ransom to save you from the empty life you inherited from your ancestors. And it was not paid with mere gold or silver, which lose their value. It was the precious blood of Christ, the sinless, spotless Lamb of God*(1 Peter 1:18-19 NLT).

Christ is the solution to the problem Adam created: *"For the sin of this one man, Adam, caused death to rule over many. But even greater is God’s wonderful grace and his gift of righteousness, for all who receive it will live in triumph over sin and death through this one man, Jesus Christ*"( Romans 5:17 NLT).

For all have sinned but Jesus is the cure for sin.

This is the first reason I'm a field Evangelist preaching the Gospel and encouraging others to join the train.

*ACTION POINT*: Study this short devotional sermon and check all scriptures. Meditate on them and start writing your action plan on how you'll rescue the lost from the consequences of original sin inherited from Adam.

DEVOTIONAL 0681 | Source start line: 63451
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10/30/22, 4:45 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Sunday,
October 30th, 2022.

*WHY THE WORLD NEED JESUS* Pt.2

Romans 6:24 *For the wages of sin is death, but the free gift of God is eternal life through Christ Jesus our Lord*(NLT)

*TO ESCAPE ETERNAL DEATH*

I am on the field of souls because I want as many to escape eternal death. There's a pending disaster that awaits every unsaved soul. It is called eternal/ second death.

When God created mankind, He placed him in a garden where all he needed were provided. Mankind and his world were in perfect state and condition. No sickness, disaster, earthquake, volcano, insurgency, wars, terrorism, accident and all manners of evil we know today.

He was permitted to eat all manners of fruits except the fruit from the tree of knowledge of good and evil. God forbade mankind from eating the fruit of that tree but from others he could eat: *"but you must not eat from the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, for when you eat from it you will certainly die*"  (Genesis 2:17).


Unfortunately, the serpent deceived Eve, she ate the fruit of the tree of knowledge of good and evil. She didn't stop there, she gave her husband some of the fruit. Both of them ate from the fruit of the tree of knowledge of good and evil. Death resulted from their disobedience. That death wasn't physical but spiritual.

*Spiritual death is the separation of mankind from God*. Man's sin poised him for eternal death where he'll not have any hope of reuniting with God. Spiritual death has remedy but not eternal death because those that die eternally shall burn in the lake of fire forever. It is sad!

Revelation 20:13-14 says, *"The sea gave up its dead, and death and the grave gave up their dead. And all were judged according to their deeds. Then death and the grave were thrown into the lake of fire. THIS LAKE OF FIRE IS THE SECOND DEATH*"( NLT).

The second death is also eternal death in the lake of fire: *“But cowards, unbelievers, the corrupt, murderers, the immoral, those who practice witchcraft, idol worshipers, and all liars—their fate is in the fiery lake of burning sulfur. This is the second death*”(Revelation 21:8 NLT).

*I am passionate about preaching the Gospel because I don't want sinners to die eternally*. The wrath of God is coming upon sinful men. None will be able to withstand His fiery judgement.

The bible says, *"for our “God is a consuming fire*”( Hebrews 12:29). Another scripture says, *"It is a fearful and terrifying thing to fall into the hands of the living God [incurring His judgment and wrath]*"( Hebrews 10:31).

While sin brought death, Romans 6:23 says, *"...but the gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord*". This is good news. *God, being a loving father decided to provide a way out for mankind. Instead of eternal death, God made the provision of eternal life for mankind*.

For man to be redeemed from eternal death, the son of God had to die. Romans 5:10 says, *"For if, while we were God’s enemies, we were reconciled to him through the death of his Son, how much more, having been reconciled, shall we be saved through his life!*". Death was the method by which Jesus would save His people from their sins. Redemption from sin is was made possible through the substitutionary death of Christ.

1 Peter 3:18 says, *"Christ suffered for our sins once for all time. He never sinned, but he died for sinners to bring you safely home to God. He suffered physical death, but he was raised to life in the Spirit*"( NLT).

Sinners need to know there is access to eternal life. They need not partake in the wrath of God that is to come upon sinners. God sent His only begotten son to die for all so that we can be free from the penalty of sin. This is the expression of God's love for mankind. This is the message this lost world need to hear.

*Man born of a woman need to be born twice so as to die once but those born once will die twice, the second death, which is eternal death*.

Hell is no longer compulsory but now an option. There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. Accepting Christ is the escape route.

My world must hear this. Spread this Gospel with me.

*ACTION POINT*: Study this short devotional sermon and check all scriptures. Meditate on them and start writing your action plan on how you'll rescue the lost from spiritual and eternal death.

Monday,
October 31st, 2022.

*WHY THE WORLD NEED JESUS* Pt.3

2 Corinthians 5:21 For God made Christ, who never sinned, to be the offering for our sin, so that we could be made right with God through Christ. NLT


*THE PRICE FOR SIN HAS BEEN PAID*


I read the story of a man who boarded a ship for a journey that spanned for weeks on the high sea. He got on board loaded with bread and all he felt he needed for the journey.

After some weeks, his bread became stale. He became hungry but he didn't know what to do to get quality meal. He saw others in the ship eating, drinking and partying.

One day, he summoned courage to beg for food. The person whom he begged from was surprised to see a fellow passenger begging. He couldn't imagine that someone who paid the same fare could be begging.

He asked this man If he paid the price for his fare. He answered affirmatively. The man showed him where it was written that the price he paid covered for all his feeding for the period of his journey.

Religion will never show or tell you that the price of sins has been paid. Rather, religion will make you live on rituals and rites that cannot cleanse your sins. Religion doesn't believe man can be saved.




I'm glad to tell the world the price of sins has been paid fully by the blood: *"For you know that God paid a ransom to save you from the empty life you inherited from your ancestors. And it was not paid with mere gold or silver, which lose their value. It was the precious blood of Christ, the sinless, spotless Lamb of God*"(1 Peter 1:18‭-‬19 NLT).

There's no other price a man can pay for his sins that will earn him forgiveness or salvation. Salvation cannot be earned, it is gift from God.



*God saved you by his grace when you believed. And you can’t take credit for this; it is a gift from God. Salvation is not a reward for the good things we have done, so none of us can boast about it*( Ephesians 2:8‭-‬9 NLT).

*He is so rich in kindness and grace that he purchased our freedom with the blood of his Son and forgave our sins*(Ephesians 1:7 NLT).

The death of Christ alone is enough. The bible says, *"But our High Priest offered himself to God as a single sacrifice for sins, good for all time. Then he sat down in the place of honor at God’s right hand*"( Hebrews 10:12 NLT).

Hallelujah!!! Now that Christ has offered himself for the sins of mankind, no need for any form of sacrifice: *"And when sins have been forgiven, there is no need to offer any more sacrifices*"(Hebrews 10:18 NLT).

The world must hear about this saving grace of our Lord Jesus Christ. The more they try to use man-made methods, the more they'll feel condemned.

*And since we have been made right in God’s sight by the blood of Christ, he will certainly save us from God’s condemnation*( Romans 5:9 NLT).

The saving grace of God is available for the sinner: *"We believe that we are all saved the same way, by the undeserved grace of the Lord Jesus*" (Acts of the Apostles 15:11 NLT).

As a believer, let the world know that Christ has made provision for their forgiveness and salvation.

I shall preach these truths all around the world because It is the word of God and I believe it. I'm fully convinced about this Gospel.


*ACTION POINT*: Study this short devotional sermon and check all scriptures. Meditate on them and start writing your action plan on how you'll tell the world about this wonderful provision.

November 1st, 2022.

*WHY THE WORLD NEED JESUS* Pt.4

John 14:6 *Jesus told him, “I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one can come to the Father except through me*. NLT

*JESUS IS THE ONLY WAY*

*I am in the business of preaching because I am fully convinced Jesus is the only way*. There's no other way. No other way I say.

When we say Jesus is the only way, what exactly do we mean?

What we are saying is that there's no other way to heaven or to God except through Jesus. Others are just a way that leads to nowheresville but Jesus is the only way to God.

Some persons call this "Christian particularism". They charge us for being too particular about one person being the way in a world where there are options.

In a world of post modern relativism, saying Jesus is the only way sounds unthoughtful, irrational and inconsiderate.

However, the mysteries of our faith is not subjected to rationality and human philosophical reasoning.

Unfortunately, some church goers have taken sides with unbelievers believing that there could be several other ways. Some persons believe all religions in the world have the same goal.

That's a display of bible ignorance and a disregard for the revealed truth in scriptures.

We believe in the inerrancy of God's word. The truth about Jesus being the only way is revealed in scriptures and we believe it.

No religious leader claimed to be the way. Only Jesus Christ boldly declared that He is the only way to God.

Jesus said, *Yes, I am the gate. Those who come in through me will be saved. They will come and go freely and will find good pastures* (John 10:9 NLT).

Salvation can be obtained through Jesus Christ only: *There is salvation in no one else! God has given no other name under heaven by which we must be saved* (Acts of the Apostles 4:12 NLT).

Everything religion is trying to do is to find a way to please God and get to heaven but we know the way already. That's Christ.

*For since our friendship with God was restored by the death of his Son while we were still his enemies, we will certainly be saved through the life of his Son* (Romans 5:10 NLT).

Jesus is the only way by which mankind can obtain forgiveness: *"And this is what God has testified: He has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son*"(1 John 5:11 NLT).

*so also Christ was offered once for all time as a sacrifice to take away the sins of many people. He will come again, not to deal with our sins, but to bring salvation to all who are eagerly waiting for him*( Hebrews 9:28 NLT).

Hallelujah!!! The man who comes to Jesus( the only way) is forgiven and given eternal life.

Painfully, anyone who doesn't accept Jesus Christ as the only way is condemned already: *“There is no judgment against anyone who believes in him. But anyone who does not believe in him has already been judged for not believing in God’s one and only Son*"( John 3:18 NLT).

If you don't want unbelievers to be condemned, tell them about Jesus Christ. Believing comes by hearing.

*ACTION POINT*: Study this short devotional sermon and check all scriptures. Meditate on them and start writing your action plan on how you'll tell the world about this wonderful provision.

11/2/22, 11:34 PM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Thursday,
November 3rd 2022.

*AS IT IS IN HEAVEN* Pt.1

Matthew 6:9-10 *After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*. KJV

Most of us are very familiar with the phrase used for this topic. I lifted it from the popular Lord's prayer when Jesus taught His disciples to pray.

In that prayer, He taught His disciples to pray that God's will be done on earth as it is heaven. Very profound. That is to say, God expect us to walk in His will on earth just as it is in heaven.

So, If we must walk in His will on earth, we need to know the way it is in heaven. *Most of the happenings on earth aren't happening in heaven. The current state of the world doesn't reflect the state of things in heaven*.

Having a true picture of how it is in heaven( by the word) will reveal to us what His will should be on earth

*If there's no record of sickness, earthquakes, volcanic eruption, untimely death etc in heaven, then it can never be God's will on earth. Take that from me.*

Oftentimes, when disasters happen here on earth, people call it an *"Act of God*". That's labelling God wrongly.

How can God, who sits in heaven where there's no disaster be the author of a disaster on earth?

If it were, then it means that every time there's an earthquake, volcanic eruption, tsunami, a woman is raped, or a child is molested, or a father is murdered, then it would have to be the will of God. That kind of thinking is absolutely absurd!

*Whatever you cannot find in heaven that is happening on earth is not and can never be from God.*

*Often, we confuse God's permission for His commission. That God permits a thing to happen for reasons best known to Him doesn't mean He commissioned it.*

What most people fail to realize is that Satan is running the world. I didn't say he owns the world because the bible says, *"The earth is the LORD's, and the fulness thereof; The world, and they that dwell therein*" (Psalm 24:1 KJV). Hallelujah!!!

*What I'm saying is that presently, the world we live in is his territory of operation*. If not, we wouldn't have some countries legalizing abortion, LGBTQ, and other things that can't be found in heaven.

Paul says, "But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: in whom the *god of this world* hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ, who is the image of God, should shine unto them"( 2 Corinthians 4:3‭-‬4 KJV)

Satan is the god of this world. He is gifting men what he has: perversion, pain, sickness, frustration, depression, accident etc. This is because as it is in hell, so he want it to be on earth for men.

When did Satan become the god of this world? The answer can be traced to the book of Genesis. God put Adam in-charge of the garden and by extension, the world. He was the god of this world in a sense.

When he sinned, he gave Satan the right to become the god of this world. Adam had the legal right to do so but do not have the moral right to do so as Kenneth Hagin of blessed memory would say.

Since the fall, Satan began to run the affairs of the world. When he tempted Jesus, to prove that he has a stake in the affairs of this world, the bible says, *"Again, the devil taketh him up into an exceeding high mountain, and sheweth him ALL THE KINGDOMS OF THE WORLD, AND THE GLORY OF THEM; and saith unto him, All these things WILL I GIVE THEE, if thou wilt fall down and worship me*"( Matthew 4:8-9 KJV).

If you just read that, you will see that the tone of Satan's statement sounded like someone who has a stake in the affairs of this world.

Some persons felt he was exaggerating by ascribing to himself the ability to give the kingdoms of this world to Jesus.

No, he wasn't. Paul confirmed him as the god of this world. That's why Jesus came to redeem and restore man back to the way things were in the beginning.

When you see the evils happening around you, as a student of the bible, you should know where it is coming from and person behind it- Satan.

*We are caught in-between the forces of darkness that want to enforce the happenings of their kingdom on us and the force of light where we belong. We must rise against it. This is warfare not funfare*.

*The will of God in heaven which Jesus want us to pray into reality on earth is totally opposed to the will of Satan on earth.*

*We have a choice in this matter, either to pray the will of God as it is in heaven to happen to us while on earth or to accept the will of Satan happen to us*.

*I reject the latter, I choose the former*.

*CONFESSION*: I choose the will of God for my life. As it is in heaven, let it happen to me on earth. I refuse the will of hell and darkness over my life in Jesus name.

*AS IT IS IN HEAVEN* Pt.2

Matthew 6:9-10 *After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*. KJV

*JESUS DEMONSTRATED HEAVEN ON EARTH*

Jesus is our perfect example. He taught His disciples to pray that God's will be done on earth as it is in heaven.

*I love Jesus! He didn't just pray God's will but He demonstrated God's will on earth.*

He lived and displayed heaven's culture on earth. Whatever is not in heaven, he didn't permit in the life of men.

He patterned his ministry after the happenings of heaven as He saw His father doing.

*Then answered Jesus and said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do: for what things soever he doeth, these also doeth the Son likewise* ( John 5:19).

All the time Jesus healed the sick, raised the dead, had compassion on the poor, delivered the oppressed, He was demonstrating the will of the father as it is in heaven.

The anointing upon Jesus was to demonstrate the will of God on earth as it is in heaven.

The bible says, *"How God anointed Jesus of Nazareth with the Holy Ghost and with power: who went about doing good, and healing all that were oppressed of the devil; for God was with him*" (Acts 10:38).

If people are sick, oppressed, frustrated, depressed and under demonic, it is obvious it is not God's will because it is clear from scriptures that Christ was anointed to undo those things.

If God uses those things to teach people a lesson as some opined, that means God is using Satan's tool to teach his children lessons instead of the Holy Spirit. That can't be.

God can't build what He sent Jesus to tear down.

*But when people keep on sinning, it shows that they belong to the devil, who has been sinning since the beginning. But the Son of God came to destroy the works of the devil* ( 1 John 3:8 NLT).

In context, the scripture above refers to Christ destroying the works of the devil which is sin. However, we know that with sin came sickness, oppression etc because sin is the root, sickness, failure, oppression and the likes are the fruit of sin.

Some may say, "oh! all you've explained about Jesus demonstrating God's will on earth is in the past. That can't happen again."

If you have this mindset, I want you to read Hebrews 13:8 loud, *"Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever*".

Jesus hasn't changed. If He healed the sick in times past, He will still heal the sick today. If He delivered the oppressed in bible days, He will deliver the oppressed today.

Today, Jesus will do all He did in times past through those that believe in Him. He said, *"These miraculous signs will accompany those who believe: They will cast out demons in my name, and they will speak in new languages. They will be able to handle snakes with safety, and if they drink anything poisonous, it won’t hurt them. They will be able to place their hands on the sick, and they will be healed*”( Mark 16:17-18 NLT).

Anytime I lay my hands on the sick and those oppressed, I'm fully convinced I'm doing the will of God as it is in heaven. No fear nothing because I know I'm at the centre of His will.

Don't take sides with the devil. That unpleasant situation in your life is not the will of God. As it is in hell so it is in the lives of many and Satan want to impose more of that on people.

Don't accept what he throws at you. Stand against him vehemently. As it is in heaven so it should be in your life. Jesus demonstrated heaven's order on earth. Same should be your testimony.

*CONFESSION*: I refuse the tokens of the enemy in my life in Jesus name. I enforce the will of God as it is in heaven in my life in Jesus name. In heaven, there's no sickness, I rebuke sickness in my life, in heaven, there's no untimely death, I refuse death, no frustration in heaven, I reject frustration in my life in Jesus name.

*AS IT IS IN HEAVEN* Pt.3

Matthew 6:9-10 *After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*. KJV

*EDEN*

*As it is in heaven, so it was in Eden before the fall of man*. God placed man in a perfect garden called Eden.

When we look at Eden, we can catch a glimpse of God's master plan for mankind. Before the fall, everything and everyone in that garden were in their perfect state.

Genesis Chapter 1&2 and the few verses before the fall reveals the world in a perfect state. Also, they reveal God's perfect master plan for mankind.

After the fall, everything done was an attempt to restore man to the very state he was in Eden before the fall. Eden was heaven on earth.

No sickness, lack, poverty, frustration, shame, accident and all the catastrophes we have today. God's good plan for mankind hasn't changed.

*Or what man is there of you, whom if his son ask bread, will he give him a stone? Or if he ask a fish, will he give him a serpent? If ye then, being evil, know how to give good gifts unto your children, how much more shall your Father which is in heaven give good things to them that ask him* (Matthew 7:9-11)?

It is God's desire to give you good things and for you and me to live in a perfect state of health. The love of God towards us is not to withold any good thing from us as long as it is His will.

Psalm 84:11 says,  *"For the LORD God is a sun and shield: The LORD will give grace and glory: No good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly*".


Hallelujah!!! We can desire Eden again because as it is heaven so it was in Eden before the fall. Don't allow the devil preach another Gospel to you. God want you well.

*Delight thyself also in the LORD; and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart. Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass* (Psalms 37:4-5).

*I have tasted life on two sides and I can tell which divide makes serving God easy and seamless. We can't do missions and conquer the world for Christ on sick bed. Poverty can't propagate the Gospel*.

The essence of asking and  enforcing the will of God on earth as it is in heaven is to be an effective kingdom ambassador here on earth. Whatever God does, it is for His purpose not for our selfish ambition.

*I desire long life and good health because I want to preach and cover many grounds for the Lord till old age. I desire wealth not because I'm looking for a special status but because I want to spread the Gospel strategically*.

However, to walk in this heavenly order, we need to do what Jesus said: *"But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you*" ( Matthew 6:33).

*CONFESSION*: I receive the grace to be a kingdom addict. As it is in heaven, so shall it be in my health , finances, family and life in general in Jesus name. I reject anything in my life( mention cases) that can't be found in heaven.

11/6/22, 6:23 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional

*AS IT IS IN HEAVEN* Pt.4

Matthew 6:9-10 *After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*. KJV

*MANIFESTING GOD'S KINGDOM IN YOU*

Whenever some folks hear about God's kingdom, they quickly think about heaven. Yes, heaven is God's kingdom but not everything about it.

Heaven is the fullness or consumation of God's kingdom but God's kingdom starts when Christ begins to reign and rule in the life of believers. The believer is already in God's kingdom.

When we were in the world, we were in the kingdom of darkness but as soon as we gave our lives to Jesus Christ, there was a switch.

*For he has rescued us from the kingdom of darkness and transferred us into the Kingdom of his dear Son, who purchased our freedom and forgave our sins* (Colossians 1:13‭-‬14 NLT).

There's a link between the kingdom of God and the manifestation of His will here on earth. In the Lord's prayer, Jesus said, *“...Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven*" (Matthew 6:10)

That kingdom is already within us as believers and we can operate in and manifest that kingdom here on earth. Hallelujah!!!

*Neither shall they say, Lo here! or, lo there! for, behold, the kingdom of God is within you*(Luke 17:21).

The ministry of Jesus manifested the kingdom of God right here on earth through healing. The bible says, *"And heal the sick that are therein, and say unto them, The kingdom of God is come nigh unto you*'( Luke 10:9).

The kingdom of God also includes casting out demons, thus setting the captives free: *"But if I with the finger of God cast out devils, no doubt the kingdom of God is come upon you*" (Luke 11:20). Hallelujah!!!

When we manifest God's kingdom, we bring upon the lives of men the will of God as it is in heaven. Heaven comes upon the earth when we manifest God's kingdom.

Our calling is to preach the kingdom of God (the will of God being done on earth as in heaven), and demonstrate it by healing the sick, casting out demons, and yes, even raising the dead!

*And as ye go, preach, saying, The kingdom of heaven is at hand. Heal the sick, cleanse the lepers, raise the dead, cast out devils: freely ye have received, freely give*( Matthew 10:7-8).

Don't be afraid to preach the kingdom, pray for the sick, deliver the oppressed, cleanse the leper and raise the dead.

Some may say, "But it seems this kingdom message is about healing and deliverance. What about righteousness"?

Let's read Romans 14:17: *"For the kingdom of God is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost*".

Righteousness is a vital part of God's kingdom. Living the kingdom life is holistic.

*CONFESSION*: I am in the kingdom of God. I am a carrier of God's kingdom. I manifest the kingdom of God. The will of God as it is in heaven shall manifest in my life. I enjoy heaven on earth in Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 0689 | Source start line: 66206
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
11/7/22, 5:41 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Monday,
November 7th, 2022.

*YOUR ACTION IS A SEED- EXPECT HARVEST SOON*

Matthew 7:12, *Therefore all things whatsoever ye would that men should do to you, do ye even so to them: for this is the law and the prophets*.

Heard the story of a PhD student whose supervisor treated harshly. After several years ( I think over a decade), he abandoned his PhD program and applied elsewhere.

I'm the new institution, he finished in record time. He was employed and he rose to the level of Head of Department after some years.

His former supervisor applied to his department to lecture during his sabbatical but unknown to him, his former PhD student whom he frustrated out of the school was the H.O.D.

He was a major determiner in  accepting of his application. This old professor was shocked to discover that his former student was a major decider on the outcome of his application.

In the opening text above, Jesus gave what is commonly called "Golden Rule". He made it clear that action towards others should be done with reciprocity in mind.

That is, you should do to others what you expect them to do to you. It is another way of saying, "The action you sow into people's lives you shall reap so beware of what you do unto others."

Whenever we hear about seed sowing, what comes to mind is giving of money. Most charismatics are familiar with the term "seed."

However, seed sowing is not only about giving money. I have learnt over time that our actions towards others are seeds that will yield a harvest.

The principle of sowing and reaping applies to all things we do including our actions: *"Don’t be misled—you cannot mock the justice of God. You will always harvest what you plant*"( Galatians 6:7 NLT).

How you treat people is a seed you will harvest now or later. God placed us in a relational world. We can't live on this planet without relating with others.

There's a biblical standard on how we should relate with people regardless of status: *“A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another: just as I have loved you, you also are to love one another*”(John 13:34).

The seed of love should be sown into the lives of others. You will reap it. Don't expect love when you've not sown it. What you do unto others has a way of coming back to you.

*Beloved, let us love one another, for love is from God, and whoever loves has been born of God and knows God*” (1 John 4:7).

*Love one another with brotherly affection* (Romans 12:10).

*Love one another earnestly from a pure heart*(1 Peter 1:22).

Love isn't about words or feelings but how we treat others. How do you treat others? Don't be known for wickedness as a believer.


*CONFESSION*: Check what you're sowing into the lives of others. Ensure you're sowing actions you want to harvest.

DEVOTIONAL 0690 | Source start line: 66529
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
11/8/22, 5:50 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
November 8th, 2022.

*IS THE FEAR OF GOD OLD-FASHIONED?*

Genesis 42:18 And Joseph said unto them the third day, This do, and live; for I fear God.

I have heard several times that God doesn't want us to fear him. A number of persons have a view that seems unhealthy about this subject.

Outrightly, some have said we are commanded only to love the Lord but never to fear because we are sons.

They hold to what Jesus said: *"Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind*"( Mt 22:37).

While this is what Jesus said, saying we are excluded from fearing God is a gross misinterpretation and application of scriptures.

Often, they allude to the fact that "fear of God" is an old testament thing. People in this category still don't see the bible as a whole book with a whole truth that is consistently fitted together.

In defense for this all important subject, I will restrict myself to new testament scriptures that enjoins we fear God. What is the fear of God anyway?

When we talk about the fear of God, we are simply talking about reverence for the Lord. Reverence for His holiness. That's it. Loving God is also the same as having reverence for God.

This reverence is what makes us to honour him in our conduct. The fear of the Lord in us is what makes us abstain from what is sinful.

We live in a generation that is playing with sin because of the provisions of grace. Pollution everywhere, from the pulpit to the pew. So sad!

The fear of God doesn't mean to be afraid. That's unhealthy fear. That crippling fear won't make us relate with God as a father that he is to us.

I am sure that's not what the tenor of scriptures refer to. Everywhere the fear of God is mentioned, it is connected to proper conduct or holy living.

Libertinism is making holy living old-fashioned but I tell you this sincerely from my heart, "Be ye holy as I am holy" still stands even in this dispensation. It is a trans- dispensational command.

Behind holiness is that reverential fear of God. Paul says, *"Having therefore these promises, dearly beloved, let us cleanse ourselves from all filthiness of the flesh and spirit, PERFECTING HOLINESS IN THE FEAR OF GOD"* (2 Corinthians 7:1 KJV).

This is Paul talking about the fear of God here. The man that wrote about half of the new testament. The fear of God is tightly linked with holy living. They're inseparable.

In Matthew 10:28, Jesus said, *"And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell*".

This is another way of saying fear God, the one who has the power to destroy both soul and body in hell. Jesus said this. God is the one that has the power to destroy both soul and body in hell. It couldn't have been Satan Christ was referring to in that verse.

I am surprised to read in the book of Acts of Apostles( 9:31) that the early church walked in the fear of the Lord: *"Then had the CHURCHES rest throughout all Judæa and Galilee and Samaria, and were edified; and WALKING IN THE FEAR OF THE LORD, and in the comfort of the Holy Ghost, were multiplied*".

*The early church walked in the reverential fear of the Lord. Why should the modern day church preach against the fear of the Lord? Doing that is a betrayal of the message handed down to us*.

Listen to Apostle Peter on the same subject when preaching in the house of Cornelius:  *"Then Peter opened his mouth, and said, Of a truth I perceive that God is no respecter of persons: but in every nation he that FEARETH HIM(referring to God), and worketh righteousness, is accepted with him*"(Acts 10:34‭-‬35 KJV, Emphasis mine)

*If the fear of God is old- fashioned, I subscribe to it. If preaching about it will make me look "old school", I'll let it remain as my theme*.

I'll rather lose invitations to preach than to compromise the truth of God's word for acceptance. It may not be a popular truth but I'm convinced about it.

The undoing of many preachers today is that they abandoned the raw truth of scriptures to preach what suits the public who have itching ears for error. The drive to  be accepted makes one compromise the truth.

Let me close with this popular Pauline scripture that enjoins we handle our salvation with fear.

*Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with FEAR(of God) and trembling. For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure*(Emphasis mine, Philippians 2:12-13).

*I love this old-fashioned Gospel. It saves*.

*PRAYER*: Father, let your fear be in me.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
11/9/22, 5:43 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Wednesday
November 9th, 2022.

*TO CONFORM AND BECOME*

Romans 8:29, “For whom he did foreknow, he also did predestinate to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brethren.”

I was driving my children to school sometimes ago, as usual we prayed in the vehicle.

At a point, I asked my eldest son what his prayer point was. He said, "I want to become like Jesus". That struck me because I wasn't expecting that from him.

Often, when I ask my children to lead prayer or to make a request, they always pray against death, ask for provision and other physical things they need.


What do you think God's ultimate intention for your life is? To become the wealthiest on earth?

Do you think popularity or fame is God's intention for your life? Our prayers often shows we don't know exactly what God desire to make of our lives.

The plan of God revealed in scripture has never changed. God's intention for you and me is to confirm and become like Christ.

The vision of God for you and me is CHRIST. Conformity to the very image of Christ is what God have in mind.

The word "Sumorphoo" is the Greek word translated as conform. It means to fashion like another thing. To make a thing look like another image or object.

More than anything else, to conform and become like Jesus in character and conduct is germane to God.

Paul the apostle was deeply concerned about this for the Galatian believers, he prayed thus: *"My little children, of whom I travail in birth again until Christ be formed in you*"(Galatians 4:19 KJV).

The desire of Paul to see his spiritual children conform to Christ was a reflection of his personal desire as well.

*that I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, being made conformable unto his death* (Philippians 3:10 KJV)

Paul was ready to conform to the image of Christ even to the point of dying like He did. That's deep.


To conform and become like Christ, we have to stay in fellowship with Him.

*So all of us who have had that veil removed can see and reflect the glory of the Lord. And the Lord—who is the Spirit—makes us more and more like him as we are changed into his glorious image* (2 Corinthians 3:18 NLT).

We can only conform to the image of who we fellowship with. If you fellowship with the world and the things of the flesh, you'll become exactly like the world.


Paul advised, *"Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God’s will is—his good, pleasing and perfect will*" (Romans 12:2 NIV).

Henceforth, let your prayers be: "Father, help me to conform to the image of Christ and become like him in every way in Jesus name. Amen

*Kindly listen to this audio message by Bro Lanre*👇🏽👇🏽👇🏽

*DYNAMICS OF HEARING GOD Pt.3*

https://t.me/projectsaveministries/21

info@projectsaveng.org

11/10/22, 5:39 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Thursday,
November 10th, 2022.

*PROVIDE FOR YOUR HOME- DON'T BE LAZY*

1Tim5:8 But if anyone doesn't provide for his own, and especially his own household, he has denied the faith, and is worse than an unbeliever.

I was discussing with an elderly missionary sometimes ago.  He told me about a people group where men marry and withdraw from work immediately after marriage.

The men just become irresponsible immediately after marriage. They don't care where and how their wives will get money, all they are concerned about is that she must bring money home and get food for everyone in the family.

As a believer, this is absolutely wrong even If you're from a culture where this is the norm. It weighs heavily on women when they play the role their husbands should be playing.

You can be sure of one thing, those lazy men will be sex studs. A man who is not expending energy on something productive will demand sex daily. The wife becomes baby-making machine.

Always I tell people, it is impossible to see a hard-working man who have sex daily. The way and manner I hear some men demand for sex every night leaves me with so many questions about their work ethics.

*Irresponsibility isn't part of kingdom culture. The culture of the kingdom is superior to any culture*.

Laziness and poor attitude to work is frowned against in the bible: *"Go to the ant, you sluggard; consider its ways and be wise!*"( Proverbs 6:6).

*You can't be sleeping and waking up expecting manner to fall from heaven. The manna in this generation no longer falls from heaven, it is worked for.*

*Those who work their land will have abundant food, but those who chase fantasies have no sense* ( Proverbs 12:11).

Sometimes, laziness wears the garb of being too selective. Some persons have decided not to work unless they a get a job that pays a particular amount.

*There are people like that today. They don't believe in growing with little earnings. They just want it big immediately. That's one of the signs of laziness not class*.

When you meet such people,  they know the names of good cars and their taste can be so high yet they are not ready to start with little.

*Dishonest money dwindles away, but whoever gathers money little by little makes it grow* ( Proverbs 13:11).

The Bible says there's profit in every labour (Prov14:23).  It is not only men that have this problem, some women do as well.

There are women that are so lazy and will just want to sit back and be a street gossip instead of finding something productive doing.

They are not constrained by their husbands to be a sit-at-home wife but they made themselves one.

There are single men looking for ladies with good employment. Their intention is to use those ladies as a form of social security.

Some brothers hunt specially for hardworking ladies so that they can live off them.

*Singles, diagnose his attitude to work and diagnose hers as well. Don't marry someone that hates to work*.

*Lack of finance can kill romance in marriage*.

Don't be carried away with the mantra: "I have a vision and my vision will put you on the television". That's a statement of faith but quickly remind such a person to add work to faith because faith without work(action) is dead.

Singles, beware of those who build castles in the air. Their utopian dreams are always in dream land, no meaningful step taken to achieve it.

Don't marry someone who claims to be a contractor or general merchant yet you can't pin-point the exact thing he is doing. You may just be his next contract in deception.

Some homes are in crisis today because some men are not living up to their expectation as regards work and provision. The man is cool with watching t.v.all day, chatting with friends and enjoying while the wife work her fingers off.

It is quite understandable when a man loses his job but it makes no sense when a man is not ready to work to support his family even if the earnings are little. This is unscriptural. The bible didn't teach us to be irresponsible.

*Singles, don't marry a lazy spouse, God hates laziness.*

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive grace to be productive in Jesus name. Amen

11/11/22, 5:32 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
November 11th, 2022.

*DEALING WITH SPIRITUAL DEFICIENCIES*.

1 Thess3:10 Night and day we pray most earnestly that we may see you again and supply what is lacking in your faith. NIV


Sometimes ago, I experienced stinging pain under my feet. It was as If was walking on nails.

After managing that pain for months, I decided to see a doctor. The doctor said I was deficient in some vitamins.

He recommended a food supplement containing the vitamins I needed. He told me to use it once daily till I finish the whole pack.

That sounded too simple for the complaints I had.  I thought he would give me injection and take me through special procedures.

After several weeks of using the tablets as prescribed, I didn't even know when the pains left. Why was I in pains? It was because I was deficient in certain nutrients needed by my body.

The same applies to our spiritual lives. *It is possible for our faith walk to be deficient in certain areas.*

In those areas, we'll either feel inadequate or immature. In such areas, we need to seek supplies to fill up the deficiency.

Apostle Paul wrote a profound letter to the believers in Thessalonica. When I read the opening text, the last part caught my attention and it says: *"supply what is lacking  in your faith*".

I began to ponder on what he meant by wanting to supply what was lacking in their faith.

Historically, the believers in Thessalonica had a wrong doctrinal view about  the nearness of Christ's coming, and as to the state of those who had fallen asleep.

At some point, they needed correction through  accurate teaching (1Th 4:1-9). What was it that was lacking in their faith? It was accurate knowledge about the coming of Christ and events of the last days.

How did Paul supply what was lacking in their faith? He filled that gap through teaching. That's why we should never joke with sound bible teaching.

Aside teaching, there are several ways to handle spiritual deficiencies as designed by God.

You can get spiritual nutrients from anointed literatures. Books written by  genuine servants of God can add something to your faith.

You can relate with and sit with a man of God you haven't met by reading his book. In-depth study helps.

At a time in my spiritual life, I couldn't pray up to one hour, but someone( Dr Joshua Ojewunmi) practically engaged me every night in one hour prayer by the roadside in our school hostel.

In the process of time, I caught the fire of prayer and my prayer time exceeded one hour after that period of spiritual exercise. Ever since, my prayer life hasn't remained the same.

God used him to supply what was lacking in my prayer life through constant engagement every night.

Yours may be lack of adequate knowledge of scriptures, character deficiency, poor human relations, lack of passion for souls and so on.

As believers, we shouldn't stop growing. We shouldn't stop getting nourished by the word of God and discipled for depth.

However, we must be sensitive to know the areas where we are deficient spiritually.

One of the keys to growing in the faith is to detect areas where there are deficiencies and get the needed supplies.

*PRAYER*: I receive grace to know the things I lack spiritually and how to get supplies in Jesus name
