12/21/23, 6:39 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Thursday,
December 21st, 2023.

*WHY WE FACE LIFE'S CHALLENGES* Pt.12

Psalm144:1 *Blessed be the LORD my strength, which teacheth my hands to war, and my fingers to fight*. CSB

*TO LEARN FAITH WARFARE*

There are different types of warfare but the toughest is spiritual warfare. That's what Apostle Paul called 'The Good Fight of Faith'(1Tim6:12). It is Faith warfare. We don't use bombs, grenade, guns and physical weapons like worldly military men do.

There are two extremes I've seen on the subject of spiritual warfare. The first are those that see the devil in everything even when it is glaring that common sense can be applied to solve the issue at hand. The second extreme are those who do not believe there's spiritual warfare going on.

The latter suffer in silence yet claiming the devil isn't going about his business of wrecking havoc. Apostle James knew the devil won't stop doing his dirty jobs that was why he told us to resist him(James4:7).

Resisting the devil is not something you do smiling. It takes having a good grasp of the word and knowing your rights and privileges in Christ. This is the real faith warfare we're talking about not just yelling at the devil and doing gymnastics.

Getting to your promised land comes with lots of confrontations. Ask the children of Israel. They fought the Amalekites, Hittites, Perizites, and other nations before they possessed the promised land.

Your wilderness season is the time for you to master the art of faith warfare. When believers sleep, the enemy is fully awake to perpetrate evil, launch attacks and destroy. Fight!!!

*PRAYER:* Father, I receive grace to overcome the battles of life In Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1069 | Source start line: 101134

12/22/23, 6:25 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
December 22nd, 2023.


*BIG ON THE OUTSIDE BUT EMPTY INSIDE*

Prov6:32 *But the man who commits adultery is an utter fool,for he destroys himself*(NLT)

A married man was transferred  from his base to another town from office. When he got to his new station, he was hooked to a strange lady that was warming his bed for him. Unfortunately, this lady was  a choir mistress in her church and this man attended thesame church with her.

After one of their sex romps, this man said that he was empty. He was emphatic about being 'empty'. That's what sexual immorality does to her victims.

As an aside, I don't support distance between couples. A number of persons brought strange men and women into their lives due to long distance in their marriages. *Do not relocate abroad without taking your spouse along*.

I know a man who was doing well years back. All of a sudden, he began to philander. Gradually, things took a turn for the worse till he plunged his whole family into deep trouble. Unknown to him, during a deliverance session, one of the ladies he slept with confessed that she was on a special assignment to wreck havoc. She said anyone who sleeps with her will struggle through life. Immediately, I knew the source of the man's many problems.

Sexual immorality does not add to any man. It leaves her victims empty. If the devil want to drain the anointing of a believer quickly, most times he uses the vice of sexual immorality to achieve his aim.

There are many empty men and women walking on the street today. They are beautiful and handsome on the outside but empty on the inside. They are like a beautiful plant standing tall but eaten on the inside by stem borers. With time, they'll fall when the wind blows.

Have you ever asked why sexual immorality is used to bring down great men, either in the secular world or spiritual terrain? This is because sex involves an exchange of life, sweat and blood. It opens the tap of virtues and glory for wastage.

Some persons think the things we say about sexual immorality are just figments of our imagination. They are in doubt about it because they have seen immoral men succeed by world's standard.

The problem with such persons  is their wrong assumption. When those men or women run into trouble, they may likely not see it but as a preacher and counselor, these are things we see almost every now and then. Immoral people always run into one trouble one way or the other.

*If you're sexually involved with a man or woman that is not your spouse, you have pressed a self destruct button, please repent today. The glory ahead of you is so great and the devil is hunting for it*.

He has sent out demonic agents to lure men and women of destinies to the bed of sexual immorality so he can empty them of their glories, do not be a victim.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to stay sexually pure In Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1070 | Source start line: 101177
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
12/23/23, 5:57 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
December 23rd, 2023.

*THE NOTHINGNESS OF PRIDE*

Proverbs 16:18 *Pride goes before destruction, a haughty spirit before a fall*(NIV)

I heard a true life story from my mum about how pride ruined a man. He was the richest in his church at that time. He was using a Vespa motorbike. That was a special bike for the middle class in the 70/80s.

The big boys used Vespa while the bigger boys used cars. Those that have been around for a while know a Vespa motorbike. This man's tithe was the major financial income of the church.

However, something went wrong in his life and his pastor disciplined him for his misbehaviour. He decided not to come to church again. He knew that it would be difficult paying the pastor's salary since he was the major financier of the church.

After he left, the church's finances took a down turn. It became hard to pay the pastor's salary. The church prayed and trusted God for divine provision.

One day,  they saw a man who drove a car into the church premises. The man walked into the church.  The Pastor inquired about his identity because he didn't look ordinary. Alas! he was a Naval officer posted to that town. God led him there to join them.

That was how God turned the financial fortune of that church around. This man was so humble that not many around knew his high ranking status in the military. God replaced the Vespa rider with a car owner.

*The painful thing in replacement is that God raises a better person to replace the previous person who fails. Just think about Saul and David. Samuel called David "a better neighbour"*.

In the Hebrew, pride means to lift up self to be equal to. It is puffed up, stiff necked (stubborn) and stuck up. It is an over inflated self-esteem. It is to act arrogantly and is the idolatrous worship of self. Whenever you are not sure about how pride works,  remember the story of Lucifer. To be haughty is to be arrogant.

*A proud man is always right in his own eyes and he sees others as wrong. Proud people hardly take correction. Pride is a subtle killer. Pride brings the high and mighty down and it also prevents the lowly from rising*.

*For those that speak proudly, you can easily detect pride in them but there are proud people whose pride doesn't talk but they act it. That's an introverted pride. That's the most dangerous form of pride*.

If you will rise in life, you need to deal with pride. It is better for us to humble ourselves instead of God humbling us (1Pet5:6-7, James4:10-11).That may not be a good experience.

*God's grace and lifting is only for the humble. If you have risen in life and you don't want to fall,  stay humble*.

*PRAYER*: Father, put upon me the garment of humility in Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1071 | Source start line: 101240
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
12/24/23, 6:30 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Sunday,
December 24th, 2023.

*WILL NICE UNBELIEVERS GO TO HEAVEN?*

Acts 4:12 *Salvation is found in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given to mankind by which we must be saved*.”

Years back, I was in a vehicle with a driver. We were discussing several issues relating to salvation then he asked, "what about good and nice unbelievers, won't they make it heaven"?

I responded by telling him that heaven is reserved for only those that are saved and washed by the blood of the lamb because that is what the bible says. He was mute for sometime after I gave that answer.

I perceived that was a very hard truth for him to accept because he knew nice unbelievers with good character. Unfortunately, being nice is not enough to make heaven.

The bible says, *"Jesus answered, “I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me*"(John14:6). Anyone without Jesus will not see God.


I've studied several religion and religious leaders, none ever claimed to be the way to heaven. *Christ is the only way to God*. There's no other way that I know.


A man may be full of good works with nice reputation before men. As long as he doesn't have Christ in his life as his Lord and personal saviour, he has no standing with God.

Religion teaches men to be full of good works and to ensure that good work outweighs evil to achieve salvation. While that sounds like what agrees with common sense, it doesn't agree with "God sense".

*"For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways," declares the LORD. "As the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways and my thoughts than your thoughts*' (Isaiah55:8).

Every man inherited sin from Adam: *"When Adam sinned, sin entered the world. Adam’s sin brought death, so death spread to everyone, for everyone sinned*"( Romans5:12). Because of this sin that we all inherited, Paul says, *"for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God,*"(Rom3:23).


What is the remedy for sin and eternal death? Is it good works? This is what the bible says, *"For the wages of sin is death, BUT THE FREE GIFT OF GOD IS ETERNAL LIFE THROUGH CHRIST JESUS OUR LORD*"(Romans 6:23). That free gift is salvation.

Salvation is not what human effort through good works can achieve: *"For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith—and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God*"(Eph 2:8). It is after accepting Christ into your life that your good works will make sense to God. If you're yet to accept Jesus as your Lord and personal saviour, say the words of the prayer below:

*"Father, I know I'm a sinner. Forgive me of my sins, write my name in the book of life. I accept Jesus as my Lord and personal saviour. I believe he died and resurrected for my sake. Thank you for saving me eternally, in Jesus name. Amen*".

Compliment of the season!


====================================================================================================
DEVOTIONAL 1072 | Source start line: 101292
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
12/26/23, 7:14 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
December 26th, 2023.

*2 CORINTHIANS 13:5 INJUNCTION*

2Cor 13:5 *Examine yourselves, whether ye be in the faith; prove your own selves. Know ye not your own selves, how that Jesus Christ is in you, except ye be reprobates*?

I have listened to several preachers who claim to be Pauline in doctrine. A number of them believe it is impossible for a believer to be out of the faith. In the opening text, Paul enjoined believers to examine themselves to be sure they are in the faith lest they become reprobates. Reprobates? That's a big word.

If it weren't possible to be out of this race and become reprobates, Paul wouldn't have made that statement. Such statement shows the possibility of falling away and missing the mark. Paul recommend self appraisal to his listeners.

Self-appraisal is also known as self-assessment or self-evaluation. In the education sector,  there's a system of appraisal that is put in place known as continuous assessment. Without it, no pupil or student can graduate from the school. This is done often to ascertain the cognitive level and compliance of the learners.

In the kingdom, we also need to subject ourselves to constant self-assessment. Jesus told the Ephesian church they had forsaken their first love (Rev2:4). If they had done a self-appraisal of their faith, they may not have earned themselves the sharp rebuke they got.

Without hearing a thunderous voice from heaven, you can do a self-appraisal by yourself and come up with a score card provided you are sincere.

A prophet was challenged about his polygamous life style.  He responded by saying,  'After all,  I'm still prophesying and my prophecies are coming to pass.' That man appraised himself wrongly.  It is possible to fall away from the standard laid down.

It is possible to start in the Spirit and switch into the flesh. It is possible to be vibrant for God and not be holy. It is possible to be speaking in tongues, performing miracles, prophesying and still be sinning.

Don't let the flow of gifts prevent you from appraising yourself to know if you're still in the faith.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to stand on the path of holiness in Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1073 | Source start line: 101354

12/27/23, 6:00 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Wednesday
December 27th, 2023.

*"ANAGKAZO"- TO COMPEL*

Luke 14:23 “Then the master told his servant, ‘Go out to the roads and country lanes and compel them to come in, so that my house will be full(NIV).


Sometime ago, a young man who fixed cable t.v. for me practiced "Anagkazo" on me and my wife.  Any time he comes around to work for me, he'll find a way to tell me about his prophet. Though the man is late now.

He had a strong faith in this prophet and his ministry to the point where he'll spend productive hours talking about him. On some occasions, he told me to watch the live telecast of his prophet.

He didn't have the message of God's grace to tell the world, he doesn't emphasize Christ and his redemptive work on the cross yet he has a way of compelling people into error pointing them to a mere mortal. How much more those of us that have the true message of the kingdom.

Jesus told the story about a man who prepared a feast. He sent invitation to several guests but they refused to come. This man told his servant to go into the street to compel people to come to the banquet.

The Greek word "Anagkazo" was used in vs 23 as compel. "Anagkazo" mean to compel, constrain or to use entreaties.

In matters of soul winning, God is expecting us to "Anagkazo" souls into the kingdom. That we failed at it yesterday doesn't mean we won't succeed today.

This is not the time to keep silent. Get on the streets, go to the villages, and tell the world about the redeeming power of this Jesus Christ who died and resurrected.

2 Kings 7:9 says, *"Then they said to each other, "What we're doing is not right. This is a day of good news and we are keeping it to ourselves. If we wait until daylight, punishment will overtake us. Let's go at once and report this to the royal palace*".
Brother, today is the day of good news, don't keep it. Jesus is coming soon and we must win as much as we can to the Lord before he comes. Let's "Anagkazo" them into the kingdom.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to devote myself to the great commission like never before in Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1074 | Source start line: 101401
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
12/28/23, 7:14 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Thursday,
December 28th, 2023.

*MY EXPERIENCE WITH THE COMMITTEE*

Acts8:20 *Peter answered: "May your money perish with you, because you thought you could buy the gift of God with money*!( NIV)

We visited a committee of church leaders in one of the African countries. Our intention was to discuss the possibility of holding a crusade. During the meeting, one of them asked me a strange question saying, "Sir, we want to know if raise offering and sell items".

Now, I wasn't expecting that. I told them I don't raise special offerings in crusade neither do I sell handkerchief, water and tokens in the name of anointing. They were pleased to hear that and they gave me the right hand of fellowship. They asked that question probably because of certain experiences they've had with those who merchandize the anointing.

Simony is the term that comes from Simon Magus, the magician who tried to buy the power to bestow miracles from the Apostles (Acts 8:18).

*Simony is the practice of buying or selling of something spiritual or closely connected with the spiritual*. Simon Magus thought God's power could be bought with money but he was totally wrong.

Thank God Peter was quick to let him know God's power and anointing can't be bought with paper currency. If Peter was covetous, he could have told Simon Magus to sow into the anointing to attract the anointing as some do today. I see alot of people deceived into Simony today.

*Telling someone to sow into the anointing to attract the anointing is fraudulent. It is not different from what Simon Magus attempted to do. Thank God Peter put things straight as a record for this deceived generation that is constantly told to sow into the anointing to attract the anointing*.

*Spiritual things are priceless and can't be bought with money. The moment you understand this, you'll be free from manipulations.* I have read several cases of people who were deceived to sow a seed to attract a particular anointing.

They sold their properties or borrowed. When they didn't get the promised result, they felt deceived. Some returned  demanding a refund.

*If anointing can be bought with money, only the rich would be anointed.*

There are those who will tell unfounded stories about how someone sowed into their lives and got miracle money. Most of these are gimmicks to empty people's pocket. I am not saying God doesn't bless people miraculously but principally, money is made by principle which is why unbelievers can make money without fraud.

Our blessing in Christ is spiritual and the blood of Christ purchased it for us, *"Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in the heavenly realms with every spiritual blessing in Christ*"(Ephesians 1:3).

Beware of merchants on the pulpit. If you have to pay a certain amount to attract a kind of blessing, just know it is not from the throne of grace.

*The price for anointing is paid with personal consecration not with human currency.*

*PRAYER*: I refuse to be deceived in Jesus name. Amen

DEVOTIONAL 1075 | Source start line: 101452
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
12/29/23, 6:06 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
December 29th, 2023.

*THANK HIM*

Psalms68:20 *Our God is a God who saves;from the Sovereign Lord comes escape from death*.

Years back, I boarded a public bus popularly called 'danfo'. On the way, the driver drove into a filling station to refuel. His engine was on while the petrol attendant was serving the fuel into the vehicle. All of a sudden, the engine compartment began to smoke and everyone in the bus scampered for safety.

One of the petrol attendants brought a fire extinguisher to the scene. I sat in the front not knowing what was happening. My senses told me an explosion could occur when smoke meets with petrol. I tried to escape like everyone in the bus but the door was not opening easily.

Somehow, I forcefully opened the door. Even though I was obstructed by a hefty man, I pushed him out of my way. Foolishly, I began to run towards the filling station instead of running away from it.

When I came to my senses, I knew If an explosion had occurred, I would have died but I saw God's hand in all that happened. The escape was divine.

I have heard some believers who  attributed their safety or escape from an accident as a result of the skills they acquired from watching action movies. That's a slap on the grace of God that delivered you from death.

The psalmist says, *'from the sovereign Lord comes an escape from death*'. Think about the number of times you have had a close shave with death. It was not by your power but from the Lord. I want you to think deeply and thank God for the several escapes.

*PRAYER*:- Father, I thank you for your sovereignty that has kept me alive. All glory to your name In Jesus name.

Sunday,
December 31st, 2023.


*IT IS NOT OVER UNTIL YOU TESTIFY*.


Ecclesiastes 7:8 *The end of a matter is better than its beginning, and patience is better than pride* (NIV)


I watched a short film about a lady who complained to God that her year did not go well because God did not answer her prayers. That day was 19th December so she thought there was nothing good left in that year. Early in the year, she asked the Lord for three things: a car, Canadian visa and promotion at work.

In a revelation, Jesus told her that If her request for a car had been granted at the time she wanted it, she would have been behind the bars because Satan planned she'll kill someone with the car. Further, If she had gotten a Canadian visa, she would have been out of his will for her life. Lastly, a promotion at work could have led to her death through poisoning because many are coveting same.

Then she asked the Lord what was left for her in the year. The Lord told her his plan was to establish her and make her a CEO. Before the revelation was over, an investor called telling her that the business proposal she submitted two years earlier has been approved for funding. It was then she realized God had her interest at heart and that all the failed requests were part of God's plan to place her in his perfect will.

According to the opening text,  It is crystal clear from God's word that there's a better ending for you. The devil will paint pictures of impossibilities and failures for you to see but you must decide not to take sides with him. Whatever you've experienced this year may be part of God's plan to bring you to the place of fulfilment.


The year is not over yet. There are miracles loaded in the few hours remaining this year. This year must not swallow your long awaited testimonies. I refuse to push what God has in plan for me this year till next year.

Do you think nothing good can happen today being the end of the year?  If you take side with the devil, you will end up postponing the miracles of this year till next year.

Don't give up. Tell the devil that you will enter the new year by emptying this year of its miracles. It is not over until it is over until you testify.


*CONFESSION*: My expectation shall not be cut-short. No carry over of problems, pains, shame,  frustration and disappointment into the new year.  I refuse to give up on God. Angels are delivering the miracles with my name attached on it. I shall start the new year on a clean slate and every eyes that see me shall rejoice with me In Jesus name.


*APPRECIATION*

*We appreciate all the readers of this daily devotionals and those that broadcast it to their friends and families. Thank you for spreading the gospel with us on social media in a bid to reach 20,000 people daily with God's word. A better you shall emerge in 2024 as you stay committed to the course of advancing God's kingdom In Jesus name*

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.1

John 15:5 *I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing*(KJV).

*YOU NEED GOD*

Welcome to 2024. You have anticipated to see this year since last year and here it is. Though God's calendar is not Gregorian neither is it Julian yet you and me have the opportunity to make fresh decisions that will propel our lives forward and make it count in whatever calendar we use.

*For you to make your year count than the previous, you need certain things but the most important of them all is GOD*. So many times, we get so motivated in the pursuit of our goals thinking we can do it alone. Failure to involve God in previous years might be the reason for failure.

1 Samuel 2:9 says, *"He will keep the feet of his saints, And the wicked shall be silent in darkness; For by strength shall no man prevail*". Human strength( physical and mental) is not enough to run the race of this year.

This is the age of self- help where the core message is centred on self- ability.  Self- confidence and the exercise of one's ability is not totally bad but when God is not in the equation, it would be an effort in futility.

Jesus did not mince words when he said: *'for without me ye can do nothing*'. It means you cannot do anything successfully without God. Just think about the smallest thing, you cannot do it without God.

It will be fatal to start this year without God. You'll need Him every step of the way. The wise ones will ask Him for direction on how to journey through the year.

Psalm 32:8 says, *"I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye*". This is God's comprehensive promise of divine instruction.

He has the map and navigation details. Your trust in God this year must be unflinching because you cannot do anything without him. In the broad spectrum of what you need, God is the first and major need this year. Keep desiring more of Him.

*CONFESSION*: Heavenly Father, I need you and I see that i'm helpless without you. Help me through out this year In Jesus name. Amen

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.2

Psalm32:8 *I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye*.

*SEEK DIVINE DIRECTION*

I have been lost several times while trying to locate a destination. Another experience akin to that is being misled by people you think could give you the right direction to your destination. That is common to Lagosians.

In Lagos, almost everyone you ask for direction to certain destinations claims to know the way. Those living in Lagos can relate with what I am saying.

It is painful to think you're on the right path whereas you're totally off course. The worst is when you're speeding on the wrong path. Speed is useless in the wrong direction.

This year, you need to live your life each day with a sense of direction from God. *Those who don't have a sense of direction end up in the valley of confusion*.

Most times, confusion leads to depression and ultimately, destruction may result. You cannot maximize your potential in life and make best use of time and opportunities If you don't have a definite direction.

*Knowing the path to tread in life helps to save time, resources and energy that would have been wasted on frivolous living*.

You cannot afford to make the same mistakes you made last year. Last year, you decided on so many things without asking the Holy Spirit. Do not make that mistake this year.

Quit being wise in your own eyes. Don't relocate to another town or country without being led by the Spirit. The pastures may not be green as you were told.

The Spirit of God knows the map of this year and the details. He has the blue-print for the year, take advantage of His ministry and you'll experience success in all your endeavour.

*CONFESSION*: Holy Spirit of God, I am open to your direction this year, direct me in all my ways and lead me every step of the way In Jesus name.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.3

1Thess5:17- *Pray without ceasing* (KJV*

*A VIRILE PRAYER ALTAR*

Whenever we talk about having a virile prayer altar, what comes to the mind of some is the prayer exercise chosen by the church.

Some think in terms of being faithful in attending prayer meetings and prayer crusades. Online prayer meetings is inclusive.  That's fine. I love corporate prayer but that is not enough to satisfy my cravings for deeper fellowship with God. I see prayer as a vital element of my fellowship with God that I must not play with.

The true definition of having a prayer life is that consistency in private prayers when alone with no one but God. The number of prayer meetings you attend( online&onsite) is not the definition of having a prayer life. It is your consistency in personal prayer that does.

There is a generation of elitist who sees prayer as an unnecessary spiritual exercise instead of engaging in cogitation aimed at solving problems.

Some wonder why we spend long hours and days fasting and praying. If only they knew that the spiritual controls the physical and that prayer is one of the access of operation in the spirit realm, probably they wouldn't have casted aspersion at praying men and women.

In this new year, your prayer life must not be occasional or ceremonial. It must be daily and consistent.

This is a year for those that are in touch with heaven constantly. Previously, we talked about being directed by God in all areas of our lives.

*The channel through which divine direction comes is opened and sharpened through prayer because prayer is a dialogue and not a monologue*.

*Prayer prepares and conditions us for God's will. That is why I believe time spent in the place of prayer is never wasted but imvested*. The power for sustenance is released through prayer.

*HOW TO MAKE YOUR 2024 COUNT* Pt.4

Psalm119:105 *Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path*

*YOU NEED LIGHT- GO FOR IT DAILY*

In your walk with God this year and beyond, you need the word of God. The Psalmist didn't mince word when he called the word of God lamp and light.

The work of a lamp is to brighten dark places. When there's darkness, the entrance of light dispels it immediately. That's just how the word works in our lives.

*You need the word of God in quality and quantity*. You must make it a daily habit to study God's word so that you can draw benefits from it. A christian that is not loaded with God's word will be weak and worthless.

*The food your spirit man eats is the word of God. What food is to your body is what the word of God is to your spirit. The tool for training your spirit man to be strong and sensitive is the word of God*.


Another area of concern for me is getting accurate knowledge of the word. Aside personal study of the word, you need to position yourself in a church where God's word is taught accurately.

Any church that places premium on teaching sound doctrine will help your spiritual growth. The days of jamboree christianity is over. We are in the end of times and only those that are solidly rooted in the truth shall stand.

Every generation experiences a battle between right and wrong, lies and truth. Social media has amplified many errors. The gullible have accepted lies as truth.   This year it not be any better in that regard because we'll have to contend with heretics till we see Christ. Emulate the Berean believers.

Acts17:11 says, *"And the people of Berea were more open-minded than those in Thessalonica, and they listened eagerly to Paul’s message. They searched the Scriptures day after day to see if Paul and Silas were teaching the truth*".


*It must be your personal goal this year to increase in the knowledge of God's word. The starting point is a daily commitment to personal study of God's word*.


Ask the Holy Spirit to explain what you don't understand from the word. Let your root grow deep in God's word so that you won't to be tossed around this year by every wind of doctrine.

*CONFESSION*:- I receive grace to be a word-addict. The word is changing me daily into the image of Christ In Jesus name.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.5

Luke5:16- *But Jesus often withdrew to lonely places and prayed*

*YOU NEED FREQUENT PERSONAL RETREATS*

In 2017, I attended a ministers conference where one of the speakers told us where he failed as a minister. This preacher told us how busy he was preaching here and there,  honouring invitations.

God drew his attention to something he had abandoned- personal retreats. From his story, I learnt It is possible to be popular with men but not with God.

He told us that in the early days of his ministry, he had a culture of spending minimum of three days in God's presence away from distractions and ministry engagements often but as the ministry grew, that became a thing of the past.

It is hard to hear ministers of his stature talk about their failures . It is common to hear most ministers talk as If they've been perfect at all times.

I respect those that warn the upcoming generations about their personal failures  to avoid repetition of the same mistakes they made.  Sometimes,  it is better to learn from your mistakes and that of others than from vague success stories.

Looking at the life of Christ, though he is the saviour of the world, in his earthly days, he had a culture of withdrawing to lonely places to be alone with the father. Don't forget that he was in high demand in his days.

People were always looking for him so  he could perform miracles for them and probably feed them. *He didn't allow the demands of people on his anointing to override the demand of heaven for intimacy*.

This is where I think some ministers miss it. They are billed to preach in major cities and towns, their faces are everywhere on billboards and posters but their intimacy with God has dwindled.

You may say,  'I'm not a preacher, how does this apply to me? If I may ask, are you a Christian? If you are truly a follower of Christ, you need to imitate him. If Christ( our master) had a culture of withdrawing from distractions for personal retreats, all CHRISTians should do same because we are meant to be imitators of Christ( 1Cor11:1).

That is how you can draw strength from heaven, receive insights from the word and receive revelations about God's plan for your life. Our generation is becoming too busy to spend quality time with God.    'Busyness' is a killer of intimacy with God. Don't be too busy to be with God.

*CONFESSION:* I am going deeper daily in my walk with God. I shun distractions and stay close to the father In Jesus name.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT*  Pt.6

Proverbs 18:24 *There are persons for companionship, but then there are friends who are more loyal than family*. CEB

*YOU NEED QUALITY RELATIONSHIP*

Recently, I was chatting with a brother who was an executive in our fellowship back in the university. We have an alumni whatsapp group. I complained to him that a number of persons shunned the group.

He gave me several reasons why some chose not to belong. Some feel they don't need it.   I remember telling him that deep seated pride and lack of understanding about the value of relationship is one of the reasons a number of persons closed their door on reuniting with old brethren.

I thank God for where I am today in life and ministry. It is by His power alone.  However, God has packaged my progress and answer to my several prayers into quality relationships. Almost everything that is working for me is embedded in those relationships i've nurtured over time.

Most people failed to build quality relationships in previous years, that account for why they are where they are today. It is not prayerlessness nor laziness but lack of value for quality relationship.

*You will not make progress in the new year until you realize that man is God's method of bringing answers to your numerous requests*.

*We need to learn how to build destiny relationships and move those relationships with us from one season of life to another. It is not wise to forget old friends because you've made new friends*.

One skill you must acquire this year is how to build quality relationship with those that are relevant to your journey in life and how to retain them. You will always need quality relationships to leverage on in life.

Pastor Temiloluwa ola said: *'There is no pride in saying, "I do not have friends and I do not need friends". Even Jesus had friends. Friendship is key. When there was famine in Isaac's time, do you know what he leveraged on was a friendship established by Abraham with Abimelech at Gerar. So before you scream that Isaac sowed in the land and got a hundred fold, remember that there was also a solid relationship to leverage on'*.

*I have noticed that some miracles, breakthroughs and great opportunities are packaged inside quality relationship. The friend of yesterday that you abandoned may possess the key to the open doors you need today*.

Your life is incomplete without a touch of quality relationship in it. Joseph built friendship in prison that translated later to an opening in the palace. Despite his prophetic dream, its fulfilment depended on a relationship.

Thank God for prophetic declaration and anointing, despite that, David couldn't be enthroned without leveraging on his relationship Jonathan.

*ACTION POINT:* Don't discard quality relationships. Use your electronic gadget to stay in touch with friends even if you can't visit. It will pay off very soon.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.7

1Cor11:1 *Be ye followers of me, even as I also am of Christ*(KJV).

*YOU NEED MENTORS*

The late Dr Bola-Akin John mentored me in ministry. He taught me certain things I wouldn't have known or heard from so many senior ministers. He did not hoard from me the information I needed.

Till date, I am eternally grateful to God I met him. He gave me the gift of access. As a wise mentee, I used the privilege judiciously. I sat under him in classroom sessions and conference meetings. I read some of his books and listened to his messages.

Who is a mentor? A mentor is a trusted and tested counsellor, leader and influencer whose life is worth emulating. That is my own definition. If the person you call your mentor is not wise, lacks depth in counsel and cannot be emulated, the person has failed the mentorship test. For several facets of your life, you need a mentor.

This year, you need men and women that can give good counsel and monitor your progress. For this to happen, that means you must have access to the person mentoring you, even if it is by phone.

*True mentoring involves access and contact*. You cannot call someone your mentor If access is blocked. Today, I see a number of folks who drop names of big preachers and call them mentors yet they have no access to them. *Someone who is not monitoring your progress can never be your mentor*.


*The failure some experienced in ministry, business or career is not because they don't know how to pray or fast, sometimes it is either because they lack mentors or are mentored wrongly. There is nothing you want to achieve that someone somewhere has not achieved.

Simply hook up with someone who has the experience and counsel you need. Mentorship is scriptural. Jesus mentored the twelve, Jethro mentored Moses( Ex18), Moses mentored Joshua( Deut31&34), Elijah mentored Elisha(1Kings19&2Kings2), Barnabas mentored Paul( Acts4,9 and 11),  Paul mentored Timothy(Acts16, Phil2 and 1&2 Tim).

Who is your mentor? As long as you think you know it all, your year may not be different from the previous.

*Being mentored requires willingness to learn and submission*. Those who have a know-it-all attitude cannot be mentored.

*ACTION POINT*: Mentorship is not meant to take the place of divine leading by the Spirit but to help fine tune it. In areas where your life isn't making progress, you need a mentor. Prayerfully find one.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.8

1 Timothy 3:4 *He must manage his own household well, with all dignity keeping his children submissive*( ESV)

*BUILD A STRONG FAMILY*

Mount Zion Film Ministries produced a film that buttresses today's point. In that movie, there were two women who sensed the call of God into the ministry. However, one of them launched out fully without considering her husband and children while the second waited to settle her family before launching out. She did this after her husband released her at the right time.

The first woman was all over the place. In fact, whenever she comes around to see the other woman, she spoke highly about her ministry. This made the other woman feel bad but her husband told her there is a set time for everything. The son of the first woman became wayward and was expeled from school. The children of the other woman turned out well and her ministry flourished with a good family testimony to back it up.

*In this ever busy world of ours, the devil has succeeded in shifting the focus of many away from the things that matters to mundane pursuit. The family and church is one of his prime target. In fact, If he can get his agenda fulfilled in homes, he has gotten the church*.

So many believers( preachers inclusive) do not have time for their families any more, everything about them revolves around work. Some men are looking for out of town or country job opportunities without taking their families along. This is Satan's ploy to weaken the marriage institution.

Togetherness for fellowship and edification is God's intention for marriage. One of the reasons why some fell into adultery is because of long distance away from their spouses. The worst I have seen is when couples live separately across countries and continents. In my opinion,  this is not God's will no matter the excuse given for this.

Ministers of the gospel are not left out in this. This has contributed greatly to the scattering of many families. As a preacher, don't honour invitation at the expense of your family.

*Some preacher's wives are not happy because they lack due attention from their husbands. Some react and show it in their attitude making it look as If they are not supportive of their husband's ministry. Actually, they do but the template their husband is using is the wrong one. That is what they are reacting to*

*I am not a fan of living apart from ones spouse and children because of ministry. Even If the ministry is growing and spreading without a compact family, it is against the order of marriage. It is better not to marry and focus on ministry than to marry and neglect the family because of the ministry*.

Most times, it tells on the psyche of the children in later years. A child who did not experience a compact family unit may not know how to build one in later years because no one modeled it to him.

Have you seen children who decided they won't go into ministry even If the Lord calls them? Some made that decision because their dad was an absentee dad in their growing years. Some do not know what fatherly or motherly love is despite having all their needs met. They become dysfunctional in their orientation about marriage.

This is a new year, consider building a strong family. The benefit of that decision is not for today only but for tomorrow and the rest of your life.

*ACTION POINT:* This year, make your family your priority. It requires making sacrifices but it would pay off at the end.

DEVOTIONAL 1085 | Source start line: 102076
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1/9/24, 5:24 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Tuesday
January 9th, 2024.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.9

Deut8:18- *You shall remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth, that he may confirm his covenant that he swore to your fathers, as it is this day*(ESV)

*YOU NEED FINANCIAL INTELLIGENCE(A)*

You may have come across the phrase 'financial intelligence' without knowing the meaning or probably an ambiguous meaning was given when you heard it.

What is financial intelligence? In lay man's definition, it means to be intelligent about financial matters. It revolves round what you earn, how to manage your income and how to intelligently multiply your income through investments.

No matter how spiritual you are, you need financial intelligence to live comfortably. Even as a preacher of the Gospel, you need it. It is shameful to live in debt or penury as a preacher of the Gospel.

At present, the economy of most countries is shaky. Recently, I was surprised to read about unemployment and inflation in some Western countries. For those living in this part of the world, that has been a normal occurence.

*Financial intelligence starts with proper management of your finances and then multiplying it. It involves getting the right financial education and living it daily*.

*A simple pointer to how intelligent you are in financial matters will be seen in how you spend. For instance,  If you spend beyond your earnings, it shows you lack financial intelligence because debt won't be far from you*.

I ince heard someone saying that he spends more than his income, that is financial foolishness and such will result in indebtedness(Rom13:8).

You must learn to live on a budget and stick to it. To achieve that, ask yourself, what is my total income? How much do I want to save? How much will settle major bills in my life and family? Your budget should not exceed your income. You must be intentional about this.

Do not live to impress or keep up with the Joneses. Living within your means is a great sign of wisdom and contentment. Live in a house you can pay the rent easily and put your children in a school whose fees you can afford. If your children are sent out of school often, it might be a pointer to the fact that you are doing beyond your financial capacity.

If you always have to take loan to pay rent, it is obvious you cannot afford that rent conveniently. Why take loan to pay rent why not use the loan to build?  *You don't take loan to finance your recurrent expenditure. It is unwise. Doing that will enslave you perpetually and leave you with nothing*.

*Wise people invest loans into assets( either long or short term), they don't consume it neither do they use it to finance a lifestyle of luxury*.

Do not spend on impulse, that's the beginning of poverty. The marketers of products have a way of making you buy what you never intended buying and asking you to pay later. It is a trap, don't fall for it.

*This year, to be financially intelligent, get simple financial education. You will need it*.

*PRAYER:* I receive grace to be financially intelligent In Jesus name.

1/10/24, 5:24 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional

January 10th 2024.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.10

Matthew 25:15 *To one he gave five talents,[b] to another two, to another one, to each according to his ability. Then he went away. 16 He who had received the five talents went at once and traded with them, and he made five talents more*. ESV

*YOU NEED FINANCIAL INTELLIGENCE (B)*

My former gym instructor told me how he was able to get himself some financial stability even to the point of building his house. He is quite elderly. He looks like a man in his late fifties but he is physically fit. He used a section of his house for his gym business.

He told me that while he was much younger, he drove taxi to augment his income. He was gainfully employed in an office doing his white collar job but he decided to increase his income by engaging in taxi driving. That's financial intelligence there- income multiplication.

The parable of talent  has a financial lesson imbued in it. A  major financial lesson learnt is about income multiplication. The man that was given 5 talent traded with it and made double likewise the man  that received two talent.

In the school of financial intelligence,  income multiplication is another key thing that we all must learn. That is where trade and investment comes in. *Every income carries the potential for multiplication*.

A wise farmer knows too much to consume his seeds because in it lies the potential for multiple harvest. That is why famers do not sell or consume all of their harvest.

This year, there must be a conscious plan to multiply your income. In an economy where inflation has hit double digits and cost of commodities keeps rising, that salary you've been collecting for years may no longer suffice.

In this case, simple financial wisdom is what you need to thrive. It is either you increase your streams of income or you cut down on your expenses. The latter is a good decision with temporary benefit but the former is better with long term benefit.

*Your little income has the potential for multiplication if you trade with it*. Financial intelligence demands that you look inwards and ask yourself, what can I do to increase my earning capacity?

If you have a skill that can be used to render services in exchange for money, just deploy it right away. It is no crime to be a uber driver on part time while you're still on your white collar job.

Have you thought about after work or weekend income opportunities?  Many of such opportunities abound around us. Let down your pride and throw shame to the dust bin.  Some graduates are poor and beggarly because they see some jobs as 'dirty'.

Some persons might argue saying, "not everyone can do business". Well, I am not saying everyone should do business. The crux of my counsel is that we all have the potential to multiply our income. God has given us one ability or skill that can be used to increase our earning.

A school teacher on salary can engage in private home teachings to increase income. A lecturer can engage in part time lecturing on weekends. An office worker can start consulting using his/her experience for those who might need it. A good writer can turn his ideas into books that can be sold. Those earning good salaries can invest in real estate and re sell when it appreciates.

Financial intelligence is just a simple exercise of common sense in monetary matters. That's all. I am not telling you to quit your job. I am simply saying that you have the potential to increase your income. Yes, you can. You carry the seed in you.

*CONFESSION*: My eyes are open to see income multiplying opportunities by the power of the Spirit In Jesus name.

1/11/24, 4:53 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL

*HOW TO MAKE YOUR 2024 COUNT* Pt.11

Deut8:18- *You shall remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth, that he may confirm his covenant that he swore to your fathers, as it is this day*(ESV).

*FINANCIAL INTELLIGENCE(C)*

Years back, when traveling along Lagos-Ibadan express way, after Berger bus stop, you will see a sign post with the inscription: "Shit business is serious business". A company that produces mobile toilet had their office around there at that time.  How did mobile toilet business start?

A man known as Otunba Gadaffi was an aide to a late politician in Nigeria. They went for a function and his boss needed to use the toilet but there was none in sight. The party was bubbling but no convenience  for people to ease themselves. Otunba Gadaffi saw that scenario as an opportunity to venture into mobile toilet business. That was how DMT mobile toilets was birthed. He made  great fortune from that business.

In almost all social functions today, including camp and convention meetings, you'll see one or two of this mobile toilets. His trademark statement was 'shit business is serious business'. Financial intelligence also involves your ability to recognize income earning opportunities.

Dearest, in this new year, you must recognize business or income earning opportunities. The inconvenience and problems that abound around you is a pointer to a business opportunity. Just look around you, there is a problem people want solved, if you can provide solution to that problem, you'll be rewarded with money.
*A man said: "Money is gotten as a reward for solving problems". Every legitimate wealthy man is solving a problem in exchange for money*.

Many years ago in Nigeria, cold water was sold in nylon. The problem with the packaging was that people doubted the hygiene of those packaging it. Also, it was unpresentable to guests. Someone decided to brand it in a sachet and called it 'pure water'. Today, sachet water is sold in almost all parts of the country and beyond.

Start looking for problems to solve that people are willing to pay for. This is a top secret of the wealthy, run with it.

*PRAYER:* Father, open my eyes to see opportunities and give me the grace to solve problems In Jesus name.

DEVOTIONAL 1088 | Source start line: 102420

1/12/24, 5:42 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: PROJECTSAVE DEVOTIONAL
Friday,
January 12th, 2024


*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.12


Deut8:18- *You shall remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth, that he may confirm his covenant that he swore to your fathers, as it is this day* (ESV).


*FINANCIAL INTELLIGENCE(D)*


I learnt some hard life lessons from my dad because he shared some of his regrets with me. He told me that in the 60s&70s up until the 80s,  most christians saw it as worldly to invest in real estate because heavenly home was their only focus. They thought it carnal to build here since a mansion await them in heaven.

When he was earning £10 pounds, a plot was sold for £5 pounds and payment by instalment was permitted yet he didn't buy a land. Often, he points to me high brow areas today that were once thick forests or cocoa farm.


Some believers in his generation were tormented by wicked and diabolical landlords who told them they don't want anyone to pray in their houses. In fact, some do not rent houses to Christians. When their eyes  opened that it is better to own than to rent, the value of land had appreciated beyond what most of them could afford in the immediate environs where they met for fellowship. Everyone went far in search for land.


Most believers in his generation were discipled by men who had extreme views about financial intelligence. For instance, my uncle told me they were told that it was carnal to have more than N3,500 in their account because when Christ comes, the money would be a waste.


I lived in the city of Abuja for a month and few days in the year 2008. One major complaint I heard from people there was about the exorbitant fees they paid for rent. Some practically work for landlords because a very large portion of their earnings goes into rent.

The situation is not better in Lagos especially in major business areas. Landlords are smiling to the bank while their tenants are labouring assiduously to put smile on their faces, then I ask myself, how long will this kind of life last?

The painful part is that I see people who buy exotic cars worth more than the cost of a  plot of land in some choice places still living in rented apartment yet they don't have any house or land anywhere they can point to as theirs. That's lack of financial intelligence.

*Some are eating their future today. How? I see young folks with phones that can buy a plot of land. Some of them saved money to purchase it. Some ladies wear wigs that can conveniently buy lands. Does that make sense*?

*Financial intelligence demands that you reduce or eliminate what goes into rent and have your own because to own is better than to rent. To keep paying for rent when you can have your own is a sign that you lack intelligence*.

*Living in luxury and paying heavily for rent without making plans for yours may lead to regret in the future*. Some top executives lived that way years ago without giving a thought to this issue,  when they lost their jobs, their eyes opened but it was late.

I know a pepper seller and market cleaner who is a landlady today. I know many drivers who are landlords but it pains to see bank executives, office workers and the educated paying rent to those they order around in their offices.

*We pray to take our world for Christ but we fail to remember that he who owns the land dominate the city. There is a reason for the word 'Landlord'- Lords of the land*.

Your impact in a place where you are liable to eviction will be short-lived. *You may not be a "Lord" over the spiritual atmosphere of where you reside If don't own a land there*.

Now, there are estates owned by unbelievers and they placed restriction on Christians buying land and building churches there. That is an exercise of Lordship over the land they occupy. It has spiritual implication. If you think otherwise, then i'll ask why they decided to restrict Christians and churches? How will the gospel infiltrate such communities? We need to wake up as believers.

Don't wait for when you'll have money to buy land in high brow areas,  the bushes you're seeing today will end up becoming a city tomorrow. Do not despise that opportunity to own a land of yours in the woods.

This year, plan and work towards it. Be wise.


*ACTION POINT*:  If you think this counsel is carnal and you despise it, remember what happened to the generation of my dad. Prayerfully make this decision this year.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.13

Hebrews10:25 *And let us not neglect our meeting together, as some people do, but encourage one another, especially now that the day of his return is drawing near*.

*FELLOWSHIP WITH GOD'S FAMILY*

Have you met people who told you that church is in their heart and that they don't need to attend a church or belong to a denominational church before they can serve God?

Many of such people abound in our world today. They believe they can pray on their own and God will answer them. That's true but going to church is more than praying , it is for the purpose of fellowship. Simple!!!

Even Jesus Christ had a custom of going to the synagogue: *"When he came to the village of Nazareth, his boyhood home, he went as usual to the synagogue on the Sabbath and stood up to read the Scriptures*"( Luke4:16 NLT).

The concept of fellowship or communion is deep but i'll try to explain it using the family relationship. You were born into a family. Ideally,  you were nurtured by your parents and your siblings were there for you while growing up.

For me, it was fun because we had relatives with us in our growing years. It is impossible to disown your root because you're grown. You bear the name of that family and still relate with them.

The church is God's family that you cannot do without. Going to church is a command that must be obeyed(Heb10:25).

You need a church where the whole counsel of God is taught without compromise. Even If you can pray on your own, you can't teach yourself. You need a Pastor that will teach you and father you spiritually.

You cannot experience the corporate anointing in your room except in the church. Some people will sit at home watching television preachers and they'll say that's enough for them. In times of crisis, maybe you lose a loved one, the t.v.preacher won't bury the dead for you neither will he christen your baby.

Till we see Jesus in glory, we cannot outgrow belonging and identifying with God's family.

*ACTION POINT*: If you don't belong to a church, prayerfully choose one and be committed there. If you have a church you attend, be regular and stay committed there.

DEVOTIONAL 1090 | Source start line: 102520
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1/14/24, 5:21 AM - Lanre Oyeleke: ProjectSave Devotional
Sunday,
January 14th, 2024.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.14

Ephesians 5:29  *For no man ever yet hated his own flesh; but nourisheth and cherisheth it, even as the Lord the church*: KJV

*PAY ATTENTION TO YOUR HEALTH*

Since my 34th birthday some years back, I became conscious of my health. That very year, I noticed drastic changes in my body and its functioning. My B.P.was slightly raised. That made me curious to know what was wrong.  Prior to that time, I have never done a comprehensive medical check but because of funny symptoms, I submitted myself for a check.

The results weren't so good. My cholesterol was raised, my immunity was down though other health parameters were fine. I was counseled to change my diet and exercise more. I obeyed partially.

After that period, I took some decisions that almost damaged my health. One of such nasty habit was to break my fast with 'garri'( cassava flakes) or orange. Both contains acid. My wife warned me to desist but I told her 'garri water' was special. Thereafter, I developed stomach acid issues that prevented me from fasting for  8 months.

Second, I stopped taking sugar for almost a year and switched to pure honey thinking I was safe. I overused honey. It replaced the sugar for tea and butter for my bread. When I ran another check, my blood sugar was at the brink despite avoiding sugar. My doctor said what I was running from in sugar is also in honey because it has a high glycemic index.

The goodnews is that my health was restored after I obeyed all instructions given fully. Today, I am healthy and fit to fulfill God's assignment for my life. Halleluyah!!!

*Dearest, If you want to last, watch what you eat. You can only live healthy If you eat healthy. You are as healthy as your diet. Exercise your body and watch your weight, obesity doesn't help*.

*No matter what your dreams, visions and aspirations are, bad health can kill them*. In the name of faith, some have died cheaply. You're God's investment, He will not want you to die without fulfilling your assignment and to profit him because he invested so much in you.

There are christians that see every sickness as 'arrow or demonic attack'. Instead of getting proper care medically, they run to prayer houses.  Yes, sickness is fundamentally from the devil but some illnesses are caused by carelessness not an attack.

It is not a sin or sign of faithlessness to submit for proper medical treatment. God's wisdom for a cure has been made available medically. Medical science is an expression of God's wisdom for the benefit of humanity. It is not anti faith.

Go for medical check up and seek medical counsel where necessary. Failure to care for your health is a sign that you hate yourself.

PRAYER: Father, I receive grace to care for my health In Jesus name.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.15

Daniel9:2 *In the first year of his reign I, Daniel, came to understand by books...*

*GET INFORMED THROUGH READING*

In history, Michael Faraday didn't have a formal education. He was only an apprentice of Humphrey Davis but he committed himself to 5hours of reading daily. Today, you cannot study physics without learning about Faraday's law of electricity.

What about Benjamin Franklin? He didn't have more than 2 years of formal education but he was an addicted reader. He invented  the bifocal lens. Reading makes you versatile and broadens your scope of knowledge.

Someone said that if you want to hide a piece of information from a black man, write it in a book. I don't want that to be your case this year. You must have a voracious appetite for information.

Good information has transformation power, it has the capability of changing you inside out. The stagnation some have experienced in business, career and even ministry is because of their failure to get good information through reading.

*Those who restrict learning to the four walls of classroom never make it in life*. Life is a race, but to succeed in the race of life, the right information is crucial.

Richard Branson at a time was recognized as 11th wealthiest Briton because of his success in business. His transformation came when he read a book titled: 'Small is Beautiful'. This is the year where you must empty your pocket into your brain. Surf the internet for beneficial information and add some value so that you'll have an edge.

Knowledge economy has come to stay and people are ready to pay for what you know provided it solves their problem. When resources finish, the knowledge gained through reading will keep selling.

*ACTION POINT*: Get the right information in your area of expertise or calling. Do not stop updating yourself from time to time so you don't become stale.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.16

Proverbs12:24 *The hand of the diligent shall exercise rule, but the slothful shall be under tribute*.

*GOOD ATTITUDE TO WORK*

I read about a young man that was recommended for a job interview. When his interviewer asked what his contribution will be to the company, he said he had the anointing of Jacob that can transform the life of Laban. That's funny, isn't it?

I don't think any employer will love to hear that especially unbelievers. It shows how unserious he was. This is a job seeker that was jobless for a period of time now begging to apply. God opened a great door of opportunity for him but he closed it because of misguided zeal.

If truly he had the anointing of Jacob that can transform, why can't he use the same anointing to transform  his life to become a CEO instead of looking for job? Think about it.

I am privileged to oversee a few business concerns for my ageing parents anytime i'm not on the mission field. I have seen Christians with bad attitude to work and at work. Most times, they cover this bad attitude with a garb of 'spirituality'.

There was a woman who resumed late to work often. Whenever she's confronted, her excuse was "I attended a vigil". In as much as I am neck-deep in spiritual activities and I encourage it, however,  It should not be an excuse for ineffectiveness at work.

*Bad work ethic and christian piety don't mix*.

*Stop threatening your boss at work. Obey the policy of your company as long as you're a staff. They didn't beg you to work, you applied. Do not constitute nuissance in your office because you don't like the policy there. It is better to resign than to cause disharmony among staff. That business/ company is  what someone laboured to build for years. If you are not satisfied, resign and go start yours since you have better ideas*.

If you are an artisan, quit lying to your clients and deliver quality services. To standout from others, give a guarantee and promise to fix whatever problem may arise under the guaranteed period.

I noticed that most artisans have lost good customers because of lies. Some Christian artisans are not exempted.

My former mechanic collected money to replace the engine seat of my vehicle. When I checked what he did, I discovered  he didn't replace the bad engine seat. He used super glue and sand to mend the broken part. He lost me and I can never recommend anyone to him. Some artisans would have turned multi millionaires but little unfaithfulness here, lies and mediocrity in job delivery there limited them.

Assess how you've been working and why you haven't made progress, it could be because of bad attitude. This year, deliver quality services. Work well.

*ACTION POINT*: Ask yourself and probably others about what you can do to improve on your job.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.17

Proverbs11:24 *Give freely and become more wealthy;be stingy and lose everything*
*CULTIVATE THE HABIT OF GIVING*

As a university student, from my very first year until the last, my total monthly stipend was N10,000. Out of this little money, I paid my tithe regularly and supported a missionary occasionally with N2000.

It was not easy on me because the cost of living in my school was very high yet I survived. However, I saw a worthy kingdom cause that needed my little support and I gave it. I wished I had more then. Since I gave my life to Christ till now, the Holy Spirit keeps dealing with the spirit of stinginess in me. Often times, I am led to give in an unusual way.

*It is antithetical to be stingy and still be a believer at the same time. Stinginess and Christianity don't mix. Those that find it hard to give are greedy people who have become slaves to material things*.

A wise man said, *"Giving is the proof that you have conquered greed*". I cannot agree less. Greedy people always want to have but never wanting to give.

There is a saying that giving is living. The sustenance of life and all living thing depends on giving. At certain time of the day, plants give out oxygen that we need for our survival while they take in the carbon dioxide we breathe out for their survival.

*No matter how people  campaign against giving, it is God's divine order for living and increase*. Proverbs 11:24 says *"Give freely and become more wealthy; be stingy and lose everything*".

God designed a system where increase is dependent on giving. It is a natural principle. God the father gave Christ to the world so that sinners can be saved. Our salvation was perfected because God gave Christ to the lost world. What If Christ was not given, would there be any other viable alternative? No.

*This year, I want to implore that you become an addicted giver. We do not give because we have rather we give to have*. The word of God is clear on this subject. In 2Corinthians 8, Apostle Paul gave us biblical guidelines on giving. He enjoined that we give cheerfully, bountifully and without coercion or manipulation.

Galatians 6:7 says, *"Don’t be misled—you cannot mock the justice of God. You will always harvest what you plant*"( NLT). This a divine principle that relates to all aspect of our lives, not money alone. Whatever you give is a seed, it carries the potential of a harvest in it.

*This year, start sowing good seeds on good soil through quality giving*. Start with the kingdom. In your local assembly, your giving ensures the church runs properly. That's what they use in organizing programmes, maintenance, outreaches and for minister's welfare. Hope you know it is scriptural to pay those who labour in the word and doctrine?( Read 1Tim 5:17-22, 1 Cor 9:13-14, Gal 6:6).

Also, there are missionaries on the field among unreached people, labouring to see souls saved, do ensure you extend your giving to them. Include them in your financial budget this year.

The poor, the widow and less- privileged should be on your list this year and forever. There is a reward for this.

*PRAYER*: Father, I receive the grace to be an addicted giver In Jesus name.

*HOW TO MAKE 2024 COUNT* Pt.19


Romans 10:14    *How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? and how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? and how shall they hear without a preacher?* (KJV)


*BE INVOLVED IN GOD'S MISSION TO THE UNREACHED(A)*

Dr Morris Cerrulo went to a town in a country close to United States of America. He went around preaching the gospel. He was thirsty and he saw a shop with Coca- Cola advert in the frontage. He decided to check in for a bottle of coke.

Through his local interpreter, he asked the coke vendor if he had ever heard about Jesus? The coke vendor replied by asking: Is that another brand of coke? Dr Cerrulo couldn't drink the coke in his hands because he was surprised that somewhere close to 'Christian' America, someone hadn't heard the name of Jesus.

Do you know that there are people living in our world today that haven't the Gospel of Christ once?

What is Christian missions? This involves taking the gospel message to those that have not heard  it within or across cultures and ensuring that the gospel is presented in a manner that is relevant to their culture without compromising the truth of the gospel.

This definition makes Christian missions unique because there is a target audience. The target audience of every missionary are the unreached or unengaged in a culture that doesn't have access to the gospel or 2% christians.

*Every unreached person is unsaved but not every unsaved person is unreached*.

There are class of unsaved persons that have heard the gospel severally. They have access to christian literatures, bible translation in their language but they rejected salvation.

Another class exist that doesn't have anyone to preach to them neither do they have access to the gospel either in form of literature, radio, bible translation in their language, etc. Those are the main target of missions.

God is counting on every believer to be involved in ensuring that the gospel reach the unreached people. An average of 70,000 people die daily without hearing the gospel.

What step are you taking to reachout to those that have not heard the gospel?


*ACTION POINT*: Decide to be actively involved in spreading the goodnews to the unreached this year.

*SNUFF OUT THE TICKING TIME BOMB*  Pt.1

Judges 16:20 *And she said, The Philistines be upon thee, Samson. And he awoke out of his sleep, and said, I will go out as at other times before, and shake myself. And he wist not that the Lord was departed from him*(KJV).

Figuratively, a ticking time bomb is an expression that describes a dangerous situation that may escalate beyond proportion If not checked on time. Those in military understand what may happen if a bomb detonates. Anti bomb squads quickly swing into action to snuff out ticking time bombs upon discovery to avoid disaster.

Some persons are carrying around in them a ticking time bomb that may explode if unchecked. Let's use Samson as a case study. Often, we associate Delilah with the fall of Samson. Well, Delilah was not the cause of Samson's fall. He was only a tool that aided his fall.

What ruined Samson was an unconquered battle he had with lust and lack of self control ever before meeting Delilah. He conquered cities and people. He was known for his physical strength and might but he failed to conquer the battle that raged within him- lust of the flesh.

Ever before Samson met Delilah, I noticed that Samson had been messing around with strange women (Judges14). His sexual escapades didn't start with that destructive lady. The devil knew how great his destiny was and the kind of anointing he carried. The devil x-rayed his life and found a ticking time bomb in him and that was lust and lack of self-control which expressed itself through immorality. That was the ticking time bomb in his life.

*What brings great men down doesn't jump on them suddenly, it grows with them as they climb the ladder of greatness. It is not something that jumps on them all of a sudden at the height of success and glory.*

The devil is wise. When he seeks to bring someone down, he performs his own X-ray searching for a little seed of hell in that person's life.  He arranges people, places and circumstances that will nurture that seed so as to give it full expression at a later time. Surprisingly, the devil may wait for years just to get a man down but while waiting for the time and season of execution, he'll be busy planning and preparing.

*No man falls suddenly. Every fall is a product of habits, character or attitude that was not dealt with properly before greatness*.

I heard the story of a great minister of God that fell into immorality. After having sex with that demonic agent, she said: 'after 17 years'. So they've been arranging that encounter for 17years but he didn't know. The devil found the ingredient of hell in him: Lust& lack of self control/ discipline. He arranged situation and circumstance that gave expression to lust and lack of self control.

Satan X-rayed the life of Christ but he couldn't find a seed of hell in him. Jesus says, *"I will not speak with you much longer, for the ruler of the world (Satan) is coming. And he has no claim on Me [no power over Me nor anything that he can use against Me];*"( Jn14:30).

As a reader of this devotional, I know the Spirit of God is revealing those destructive seeds in you to you. They may not stop your greatness but they want to bring you down from the ladder of greatness. It is a ticking time bomb, snuff it out.

*PRAYER*: Father, let your holy fire destroy every ingredient and seed of hell in me In Jesus name.

*SNUFF OUT THE TICKING TIME BOMB* Pt.2

Deut32:51 *For both of you betrayed me... You failed to demonstrate my holiness to the people of Israel there. So you will see the land from a distance, but you may not enter the land I am giving to the people of Israel*”.

*THE GREATEST PASTOR THAT EVER LIVED*

Do you know the greatest pastor that ever lived? In my opinion, I think Moses deserves that award. I don't know of any Pastor whether dead or living that had the kind of shepherd's heart Moses had.

He led over 3 million people out of Egypt on foot,  ensured they are well-fed (physically and spiritually), properly governed and protected. This is no mean feat. I doubt if many of us could bear a little of what Moses bore without giving up. Directly, he pastored 3 million persons in the same location not a congregation divided into branches with several pastors.

The people he led criticized and frustrated him even to a point where God wanted to destroy them all except Moses and his family yet Pastor Moses pleaded with God to spare them and God did(Ex32:9-14). That's a true Pastor. If I was Moses, I would have given God the permisssion to kill them all.

There is a need to know why pastor Moses did not make it to the promised land despite being the meekest man on the earth. The ticking time bomb of anger in him  that manifested while in Egypt and later in his ministry was what prevented him from entering the promised land. While in Egypt, that anger appeared to him as a "holy" anger but it was all Satan needed to bring him down.

In Egypt, he killed an Egyptian out of anger(Ex2:11-15), the devil saw it and he saw in Moses what he could use to bring him down but he didn't act on it immediately. Again, when he returned from the mountain and he saw them worshipping a calf, out of anger, he broke the stone tablet (Ex32:19). The devil said 'yes, this seed is growing'.

Candidly, his anger seems justified considering the stress of fasting, climbing mountains and praying but God didn't see it that way. His anger is not daily but occasional, yet it was his undoing.

The straw that broke the camel's back was when he hit the rock  out of anger instead of speaking to it, (Num20:11). That was how he missed it. From the first time he killed till he lost it at the rock, If I'm not wrong in my calculations, it took a space of almost 80 solid years.

*The seed of hell that bring men down from destiny and glory sometimes doesn't grow on time but the devil knows it is there. It manifest at the time that matters most*.

Jesus boldly declared that the prince of this world x-rayed him but couldn't find anything that belongs to hell in him(John14:30). Can you say the same thing about your life?

We all need a thorough purging. Saints of old never cease to ask God to purge them of whatever the enemy might use against them as the climb the ladder of greatness.

Paul prayed saying, *"And the very God of peace sanctify( purge, cleanse) you wholly; and I pray God your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ*" ( Emphasis mine 1 Thessalonians 5:23).

*Your earnest desire should be for a thorough purging so that God can snuff out the ticking time bomb in your life*.

*PRAYER*: Father, purge from my life every destructive seed and ingredients of hell In Jesus name.
